Whiles by the experiment of this ministration they glorify God for your professed subjection unto the gospel of Christ, and for your liberal distribution unto them, and unto all men;
And by their prayer for you, which long after you for the exceeding grace of God in you.
TG Thanksgiving.Thanks be unto God for his unspeakable James 1:17.gift.

div.p: Bring every thought into obedience—Paul glories in the Lord.

chapter.verse: Now I Paul myself beseech you by the D&C 19:23; 25:5 (5, 14).meekness and gentleness of Christ, who in presence am base among you, but being absent am bold toward you:
But I beseech you, that I may not be bold when I am present with that confidence, wherewith I think to be bold against some, which think of us as if we walked according to the flesh.
For though we walk in the flesh, we do not TG War.war after the flesh:
(For the Eph. 6:11 (10–24).weapons of our 1 Cor. 9:7.warfare are not carnal, but mighty through God to the pulling down of strong holds;)
Casting down imaginations, and every high thing that exalteth itself against the knowledge of God, and bringing into captivity every TG Motivations.thought to the TG Obedience.obedience of Christ;
And having in a readiness to revenge all TG Disobedience.disobedience, when your 2 Cor. 7:15.obedience is fulfilled.

Do ye look on things after the outward 1 Sam. 16:7.appearance? If any man trust to himself that he is Christ’s, let him of himself think this again, that, as he is Christ’s, even so are we 1 Cor. 3:23.Christ’s.

For though I should boast somewhat more of our 2 Cor. 13:10. TG Called of God.authority, which the Lord hath given us for TG Edification.edification, and not for your destruction, I should not be ashamed:
That I may not seem as if I would terrify you by letters.
For his letters, say they, are weighty and powerful; but his Gal. 4:13.bodily presence is weak, and his speech 2 Cor. 11:6.contemptible.
Let such an one think this, that, such as we are in word by letters when we are absent, such will we be also in deed when we are present.

For we dare not make ourselves of the number, or compare ourselves with some that commend themselves: but they measuring themselves by themselves, and comparing themselves among themselves, are not wise.
But we will not TG Boast.boast of things without our measure, but according to the measure of the rule which God hath distributed to us, a measure to reach even unto you.
For we stretch not ourselves beyond our measure, as though we reached not unto you: for we are come as far as to you also in preaching the gospel of Christ:

Not boasting of things without our measure, that is, of other men’s Rom. 15:20.labours; but having hope, when your faith is increased, that we shall be enlarged by you according to our rule abundantly,
To preach the gospel in the regions beyond you, and not to boast in another man’s line of things made ready to our hand.
But he that glorieth, let him Jer. 9:24 (23–24); Alma 26:16 (11–16).glory in the Lord.
For not he that Luke 18:14. TG Boast.commendeth himself is approved, but whom the Lord commendeth.

div.p: Maintain the simplicity that is in Christ—Satan sends forth false apostles—Paul glories in his sufferings for Christ.

chapter.verse: Would to God ye could bear with me a little in my folly: and indeed bear with me.
For I am TG Jealous.jealous over you with godly jealousy: for I have D&C 20:77.espoused you to one husband, that I may present you as a chaste virgin to Christ.

But I fear, lest by any means, as the TG Devil.serpent TG Fall of Man; Temptation.beguiled Eve through his Gen. 3:1.subtilty, so your minds should be Heb. 13:9.corrupted from the Jacob 4:14.simplicity that is in Christ.

For if he that cometh preacheth another Gal. 1:6.Jesus, whom we have not preached, or if ye receive another spirit, which ye have not received, or another TG Gospel.gospel, which ye have not accepted, ye might well bear with him.
For I suppose I was not a whit behind the very chiefest apostles.
But though I be 2 Cor. 10:10.rude in speech, yet not in knowledge; but we have been throughly made manifest among you in all things.
Have I committed an offence in abasing myself that ye might be exalted, because I have preached to you the gospel of God 1 Cor. 9:18.freely?
I GR despoiled other churches, having taken provisions for you.robbed other churches, taking TG Wages.wages of them, to do you service.

And when I was present with you, and wanted, I was 2 Cor. 12:13 (13, 16); 1 Thes. 2:9.chargeable to no man: for that which was 1 Cor. 16:17.lacking to me the brethren which came from Macedonia Philip. 4:10.supplied: and in all things I have kept myself from being burdensome unto you, and so will I keep myself.
As the truth of Christ is in me, no man shall stop me of this boasting in the regions of Achaia.
Wherefore? because I love you not? God knoweth.
But what I do, that I will do, that I may cut off occasion from them which desire occasion; that wherein they GR boast; so in chapters 11–12.glory, they may be found even as we.
For such are TG False Priesthoods; False Prophets.false apostles, deceitful workers, transforming themselves into the apostles of Christ.
And no marvel; for 2 Ne. 9:9; D&C 129:8. TG Devil.Satan himself is transformed into an TG Angels.angel of light.
Therefore it is no great thing if his ministers also be transformed as the ministers of righteousness; whose Philip. 3:19.end shall be according to their works.
I say again, Let no man think me a fool; if otherwise, yet as a fool GR listen to, bear with, follow.receive me, that I may TG Boast.boast myself a little.
That which I speak, I speak it not after the Lord, but as it were foolishly, in this confidence of boasting.
Seeing that many glory after the flesh, I will glory also.
For ye suffer fools gladly, seeing ye yourselves are wise.
For ye suffer, if a man bring you into TG Bondage, Physical.bondage, if a man devour you, if a man take of you, if a man exalt himself, if a man smite you on the face.
I speak as concerning TG Reproach.reproach, as though we had been weak. Howbeit whereinsoever any is bold, (I speak foolishly,) I am bold also.
Are they Philip. 3:5.Hebrews? so am I. Are they Rom. 11:1.Israelites? so am I. Are they the seed of Abraham? so am I.

Are they 2 Cor. 6:4 (4–10).ministers of Christ? (I speak as a fool) JST 2 Cor. 11:23 … so am I; in labors …I am more; in 1 Cor. 15:10.labours more abundant, in Acts 16:23; James 5:10 (10–11); Alma 26:29 (29–31).stripes above measure, in 2 Cor. 4:9.prisons more frequent, in deaths oft.
Of the Jews five times received I Deut. 25:3.forty stripes save one.
Thrice was I Acts 16:22. TG Persecution.beaten with rods, once was I stoned, thrice I suffered shipwreck, a night and a day I have been in the deep;
In GR toil, trouble.weariness and TG Pain.painfulness, in watchings often, in hunger and thirst, in fastings often, in cold and nakedness.
Beside those things that are without, that which cometh upon me daily, the care of all the churches.
Who is weak, and I am not 1 Cor. 9:22.weak? who is offended, and I JST 2 Cor. 11:29 … anger not?burn not?
If I must needs glory, I will glory of the things which concern mine infirmities.
The God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, which is blessed for evermore, knoweth that I lie not.
In Damascus the governor under Aretas the king kept the city of the Damascenes with a garrison, desirous to Acts 9:23 (23–25).apprehend me:
And through a window in a basket was I let down by the wall, and escaped his hands.

div.p: Paul is caught up to the third heaven—The Lord gives men weaknesses that they may triumph over them—Paul manifests the signs of an Apostle.

chapter.verse: It is not expedient for me doubtless to TG Boast.glory. I will come to 1 Cor. 9:1.visions and TG Revelation.revelations of the Lord.

GR I know a man in Christ who fourteen years ago.I knew a man in Christ above fourteen years ago, (whether in the D&C 137:1.body, I cannot tell; or whether out of the body, I cannot tell: God knoweth;) such an one caught up to the TG Celestial Glory.third TG Heaven.heaven.
And I knew such a man, (whether in the body, or out of the body, I cannot tell: God knoweth;)
How that he was caught up into TG Paradise.paradise, and heard GR ineffable.unspeakable words, which it is 3 Ne. 17:17; 19:34 (32–34).not GR possible, permitted.lawful for a man to utter.
Of such an one will I glory: yet of myself I will not TG Boast.glory, but in mine infirmities.
For though I would desire to glory, I shall not be a fool; for I will say the truth: but now I forbear, lest any man should think of me above that which he seeth me to be, or that he heareth of me.

And lest I should be D&C 3:4.exalted above measure through the abundance of the revelations, there was given to me a TG Pain.thorn in the flesh, the messenger of Satan to buffet me, lest I should be exalted above measure.
For this thing I besought the Lord thrice, that it might depart from me.

And he said unto me, My TG Grace.grace is sufficient for thee: for my TG Strength.strength is made perfect in 2 Cor. 13:9; Ether 12:27 (26–28).weakness. Most gladly therefore will I rather glory in my infirmities, that the power of Christ may D&C 39:12.rest upon me.

Therefore I take pleasure in TG Adversity.infirmities, in reproaches, in necessities, in TG Persecution.persecutions, in distresses for Christ’s sake: for when I am TG Humility.weak, then am I Joel 3:10; D&C 50:16.strong.
I am become a fool in glorying; ye have compelled me: for I ought to have been commended of you: for in nothing am I behind the very 1 Cor. 9:1.chiefest apostles, though I be nothing.
Truly the TG Signs.signs of an apostle were wrought among you in all patience, in signs, and wonders, and mighty deeds.
For what is it wherein ye were inferior to other churches, except it be that I myself was not 2 Cor. 11:9 (8–9).burdensome to you? forgive me this wrong.

Behold, the third time I am ready to come to you; and I will not be burdensome to you: for I 1 Cor. 10:33.seek not yours, but you: for the children ought not to lay up for the parents, but the parents for the children.
And I will very gladly spend and be spent for you; though the more abundantly I love you, the less I be loved.
But be it so, I did not burden you: nevertheless, being crafty, I caught you with guile.
Did I make a gain of you by any of them whom I sent unto you?
I desired Titus, and with him I sent a brother. Did Titus make a gain of you? walked we not in the same spirit? walked we not in the same steps?
Again, think ye that we excuse ourselves unto you? we speak before God in Christ: but we do all things, dearly beloved, for your 1 Cor. 14:26. TG Edification.edifying.

For I fear, lest, when I come, I shall not find you such as I would, and that I shall be found unto you such as ye would not: lest there be debates, envyings, wraths, TG Strife.strifes, TG Backbiting.backbitings, whisperings, swellings, TG Rioting and Reveling.tumults:

And lest, when I come again, my God will humble me among you, and that I shall bewail many which have sinned already, and have not repented of the uncleanness and fornication and lasciviousness which they have committed.

div.p: Saints should test themselves as to righteousness—Be perfect and of one mind; live in peace.

chapter.verse: This is the third time I am coming to you. In the mouth of two or three Deut. 19:15; D&C 6:28. TG Book of Mormon; Witness.witnesses shall every word be established.

I told you before, and foretell you, as if I were present, the second time; and being absent now I write to them which heretofore have sinned, and to all other, that, if I come again, I will not spare:
Since ye seek a proof of Christ speaking in me, which to you-ward is not weak, but is mighty in you.

For though he was TG Jesus Christ, Crucifixion of.crucified through weakness, yet he liveth by the power of God. For we also are weak in him, but we shall live with him by the power of God toward you.

1 Cor. 11:28 (27–31).Examine yourselves, whether ye be in the faith; prove your own selves. Know ye not your own selves, how that 1 Jn. 3:24 (19–24); 4:12 (7–21).Jesus Rom. 8:10.Christ is in you, except ye be reprobates?
But I trust that ye shall know that we are not reprobates.
Now I pray to God that ye do no evil; not that we should appear approved, but that ye should do that which is TG Honesty.honest, though we be as reprobates.
For we can do nothing against the truth, but for the truth.
For we are glad, when we are 2 Cor. 12:9.weak, and ye are strong: and this also we wish, even your perfection.
Therefore I write these things being absent, lest being present I should use sharpness, according to the 2 Cor. 10:8.power which the Lord hath given me to edification, and not to destruction.

Finally, brethren, farewell. Be TG Perfection.perfect, be of good comfort, be of TG Unity.one 1 Cor. 1:10 (10–13).mind, live in TG Peace.peace; and the God of TG God, Love of.love and peace shall be with you.
Greet one another with an holy JST 2 Cor. 13:12 … salutation.kiss.
All the saints salute you.
The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, and the love of God, and the communion of the Holy Ghost, be with you all. Amen.

div.title: The Epistle of Paul the Apostle
to the

div.p: Preachers of false gospels are accursed—Paul received the gospel by revelation—He believed, was taught, and preached to the Gentiles.

chapter.verse: Paul, an TG Apostles; Priesthood, Authority.apostle, (not of men, neither by man, but by Jesus Christ, and God the Father, who raised him from the dead;)
And all the brethren which are with me, unto the churches of Galatia:
Grace be to you and peace from God the Father, and from our Lord Jesus Christ,
Who TG Jesus Christ, Redeemer.gave himself for our sins, that he might TG Redemption.deliver us from this present evil world, according to the TG God, Will of.will of God and our Father:
To whom be glory for ever and ever. Amen.
I marvel that ye are so soon TG Apostasy of Individuals; Apostasy of the Early Christian Church.removed from him that called you into the grace of Christ unto another 2 Cor. 11:4.gospel:
Which is not another; but there be some that GR agitate, raise doubts, perplex.trouble you, and would Gal. 5:10.pervert the TG Gospel.gospel of Christ.
But though we, or an TG Angels.angel from heaven, preach any 1 Tim. 1:3.other TG Gospel.gospel unto you than that which we have preached unto you, let him be Gal. 5:12.accursed.
As we said before, so say I now again, If any man preach any other TG False Doctrine.gospel unto you than that ye have received, let him be 2 Ne. 28:15.accursed.

For do I now GR appease, aspire to the favor of. JST Gal. 1:10 … please …persuade men, or God? or do I seek to TG Peer Influence.please men? for if I yet TG Courage.pleased men, I should not be the servant of Christ.
But I GR declare, make known to.certify you, brethren, that the gospel which was 2 Cor. 4:5.preached of me is not after man.
For I neither received it GR from a man.of man, neither was I taught it, but GR through a revelation.by the 1 Cor. 9:1; D&C 84:1. TG Testimony.revelation of Jesus Christ.

For ye have heard of my GR conduct.conversation in time past in the Jews’ religion, how that beyond measure I Acts 9:21 (10–22).persecuted the church of God, and GR was ravaging, destroying.wasted it:

And GR was advancing.profited in the Jews’ religion above many GR men of my age.my equals in mine own nation, being more exceedingly TG Zeal.zealous of the TG Traditions of Men.traditions of my fathers.
But when it pleased God, who separated me from my mother’s womb, and called me by his TG Grace.grace,
To reveal his Son in me, that I might preach him among the GR nations, Gentiles. TG Heathen.heathen; immediately I conferred not with TG Flesh and Blood.flesh and blood:
Neither went I up to Jerusalem to them which were apostles before me; but I went into Arabia, and returned again unto Damascus.
Then after three years I went up to Acts 9:26.Jerusalem to see Peter, and abode with him fifteen days.
But other of the TG Apostles.apostles saw I none, save Acts 21:18.James the Lord’s TG Jesus Christ, Family of.brother.
Now the things which I TG Scriptures, Writing of.write unto you, behold, before God, I lie not.
Afterwards I came into the regions of Syria and Cilicia;
And was unknown by face unto the churches of Judæa which were in Christ:
But they had heard only, That he which persecuted us in times past now preacheth the faith which once he destroyed.
And they glorified God in me.

div.p: Paul goes to Jerusalem—He contends for the true gospel—Salvation comes through Christ.

chapter.verse: Then fourteen years after I went up again to Acts 15:2.Jerusalem with Acts 4:36 (36–37).Barnabas, and took Titus with me also.

And I went up by Alma 8:16; Hel. 13:3.revelation, and GR reported.communicated unto them that gospel which I preach among the Gentiles, but privately to them which were of reputation, lest by any means I should run, or had run, in vain.
But neither Titus, who was with me, being a Greek, was compelled to be TG Circumcision.circumcised:

JST Gal. 2:4 Notwithstanding, there were some brought in by false brethren unawares, who …And that because of false brethren unawares brought in, who came in privily to spy out our TG Liberty.liberty which we have in Christ Jesus, that they might bring us into TG Bondage, Spiritual.bondage:
To whom we gave place by subjection, no, not for an hour; that the truth of the gospel might continue with you.
But of these who seemed to be somewhat, (whatsoever they were, it maketh no matter to me: God accepteth no man’s person:) for they who seemed to be somewhat in conference added nothing to me:
But contrariwise, when they saw that the 1 Cor. 9:17.gospel of the uncircumcision was committed unto me, as the gospel of the TG Circumcision.circumcision was unto 1 Cor. 9:1.Peter;
(For he that wrought effectually in Peter to the apostleship of the circumcision, the same was mighty in me toward the Gentiles:)

And when James, John 1:42.Cephas, and John, who seemed to be pillars, perceived the TG Grace.grace that was given unto me, they gave to me and Barnabas the right hands of TG Fellowshipping.fellowship; that we should go unto the GR nations, Gentiles.heathen, and they unto the circumcision.
Only they would that we should remember the poor; the same which I also was forward to do.
But when Peter was come to Antioch, I withstood him to the face, because he was to be blamed.
For before that certain came from James, he did eat with the Gentiles: but when they were come, he withdrew and separated himself, fearing them which were of the circumcision.
And the other Jews dissembled likewise with him; insomuch that Barnabas also was carried away with their GR hypocrisy.dissimulation.

But when I saw that they walked not uprightly according to the truth of the gospel, I said unto Peter before them all, If thou, being a Jew, livest after the manner of Gentiles, and not as do the Jews, why compellest thou the Gentiles to live as do the Jews?
We who are Jews by nature, and not sinners of the Gentiles,

Knowing that a man is not TG Justification.justified by the works of the D&C 22:2.law, but by the faith of Jesus Christ, even we have believed in Jesus Christ, that we might be justified by the Moro. 7:33 (7–33).faith of Christ, and not by the Mosiah 13:28 (27–32).works of the 2 Ne. 2:5 (5–8).law: for by the works of the law shall no flesh be GR vindicated, approved, guiltless.justified.
But if, while we seek to be justified by Christ, we ourselves also are found sinners, is therefore Christ the minister of sin? God forbid.
For if I build again the things which I destroyed, I make myself a transgressor.
For I through the law am Rom. 7:4 (1–7).dead to the law, that I might Rom. 6:11 (9–11).live unto God.

I am crucified with Christ: nevertheless I live; yet not I, but John 17:22 (20–23).Christ Rom. 14:7 (7–9).liveth in me: and the life which I now live in the flesh I live by the TG Faith.faith of the Son of God, who loved me, and gave himself for me.
I do not frustrate the TG Grace.grace of God: for if righteousness come by the Mosiah 13:28 (27–31).law, then Christ is dead in vain.

div.p: God gave the gospel to Abraham—The Mosaic law was added because of transgressions—The law was a schoolmaster until Christ—The Saints are children of God by faith—All who are of the faith and baptized into Christ become Abraham’s seed.

chapter.verse: O foolish Galatians, who hath Jacob 7:18 (16–18). TG Apostasy of the Early Christian Church.bewitched you, that ye should not obey the truth, before whose eyes Jesus Christ hath been evidently set forth, crucified among you?
This only would I learn of you, Received ye the Spirit by the works of the 2 Ne. 2:5; Mosiah 13:28 (27–28).law, or by the Rom. 10:17.hearing of faith?
Are ye so foolish? having begun in the Spirit, are ye now made perfect by the flesh?
Have ye suffered so many things in vain? if it be yet in vain.
He therefore that GR grants, furnishes.ministereth to you the Spirit, and worketh miracles among you, doeth he it by the works of the law, or by the hearing of faith?
Even as Abraham believed God, and it was accounted to him for TG Righteousness.righteousness.
Know ye therefore that they which are of faith, the same are the TG Abrahamic Covenant.children of Abraham.

And the scripture, foreseeing that God would justify the TG Heathen.heathen through faith, preached before the TG Gospel.gospel unto Abraham, saying, In thee shall all TG Israel, Mission of.nations be TG Mission of Latter-day Saints.blessed.
So then they which be of faith are TG Israel, Blessings of.blessed with faithful Abraham.
For as many as are of the works of the law are under the curse: for it is written, TG Curse.Cursed is every one that continueth not in all things which are written in the book of the law to do them.
But that no man is justified by the law in the sight of God, it is evident: for, The just shall live by TG Faith.faith.
And the law is not of faith: but, The man that doeth them shall live in them.

Christ hath Gal. 4:5.redeemed us from the TG Bondage, Spiritual; Curse.curse of the Alma 42:22 (1–28).law, being made a curse for us: for it is written, Deut. 21:23.Cursed is every one that hangeth on a tree:

That the TG Blessing; Israel, Mission of.blessing of Abraham might come on the Gentiles through Acts 8:35 (29–35).Jesus Christ; that we might receive the TG Promise.promise of the Spirit through faith.
Brethren, I speak after the manner of men; Though it be but a man’s covenant, yet if it be confirmed, no man disannulleth, or addeth thereto.
Now to Ps. 132:11; Luke 1:55 (54–55).Abraham and his seed were the D&C 107:40.promises made. He saith not, And to seeds, as of many; but as of one, And to thy seed, which is Christ.

And this I say, that the covenant, that was confirmed before of God in Christ, the law, which was TG Israel, Bondage of, in Egypt.four hundred and thirty years after, cannot disannul, that it should make the promise of none effect.
For if the TG Inheritance.inheritance be of the law, it is no more of promise: but God gave it to Abraham by promise.

JST Gal. 3:19–20 (Appendix).Wherefore then serveth the law? It was 1 Tim. 1:9.added because of transgressions, till the seed should come to whom the promise was made; and it was ordained by angels in the hand of a mediator.
Now a mediator is not a mediator of one, but God is one.
Is the law then against the promises of God? God forbid: for if there had been a law given which could have given life, verily righteousness should have been by the law.
But the scripture hath concluded all under D&C 49:8.sin, that the promise by faith of Jesus Christ might be given to them that believe.
But before faith came, we were kept under the law, shut up unto the faith which should afterwards be revealed.

Wherefore the TG Law of Moses.law was our GR pedagogue, director, supervisor of children. JST Gal. 3:24 … schoolmaster until Christ … TG Jesus Christ, Types of, in Anticipation.schoolmaster to bring us unto Christ, that we might be See JST Rom. 4:16 (Rom. 4:16 note a). Moro. 10:32 (32–33).justified by faith.
But after that faith is come, we are no longer under a schoolmaster.
For ye are all the TG Sons and Daughters of God.children of God by TG Baptism, Qualifications for.faith in Christ Jesus.
For as many of you as have been Rom. 13:14; 2 Ne. 31:13 (12–13); Mosiah 5:8 (2–14). TG Baptism.baptized into Christ have put on Christ.
There is neither Jew nor TG Gentiles.Greek, there is neither bond nor free, there is neither male nor female: for ye are all Rom. 10:12 (12–13). TG Unity.one in Christ Jesus.
And if ye be Christ’s, then are ye TG Conversion.Abraham’s TG Seed of Abraham.seed, and Gal. 4:28.heirs according to the promise.

div.p: The Saints are children of God by adoption—Paul calls the Galatians back to Christ—He compares the two covenants.

chapter.verse: Now I say, That the heir, as long as he is a child, differeth nothing from a servant, though he be lord of all;
But is under tutors and governors until the time appointed of the father.
Even so we, when we were children, were in TG Bondage, Spiritual.bondage under the elements of the world:

But when the fulness of the time was come, God John 8:42; 16:28 (27–28, 30); 17:8. TG Jesus Christ, Condescension of.sent forth his TG Jesus Christ, Birth of.Son, GR born.made of a TG Woman.woman, made under the law,
To Gal. 3:13.redeem them that were under the law, that we might receive the TG Election.adoption of sons.
And because ye are sons, God hath sent forth the Spirit of his Son into your hearts, crying, Abba, Father.
Wherefore thou art no more a GR slave.servant, but a TG Sons and Daughters of God.son; and if a son, then an TG Eternal Life; Man, Potential to Become like Heavenly Father.heir of God through Christ.
Howbeit then, when ye knew not God, ye GR were slaves, were in bondage.did 1 Cor. 8:4.service unto them which by nature are no Jer. 44:3.gods.
But now, after that ye have known God, or rather are known of God, how turn ye again to the weak and beggarly elements, whereunto ye desire again to be in D&C 84:51 (50–51).bondage?
Ye observe Rom. 14:5 (5–6).days, and months, and times, and years.
I am afraid GR concerning.of you, lest I have bestowed upon you labour in vain.
Brethren, I beseech you, be as I am; for I am as ye are: ye have not injured me at all.
Ye know how through GR weakness, feebleness. 1 Cor. 2:3 (2–4).infirmity of the 2 Cor. 10:10.flesh I preached the gospel unto you at the first.
And my GR trial, test.temptation which was in my flesh ye despised not, nor rejected; but received me as an angel of God, even as Christ Jesus.
Where is then the blessedness ye spake of? for I bear you record, that, if it had been possible, ye would have plucked out your own eyes, and have given them to me.
Am I therefore become your enemy, because I tell you the Hel. 13:26. TG Truth.truth?
They zealously affect you, but not well; yea, they would exclude you, that ye might affect them.
But it is good to be TG Zeal.zealously affected always in a good thing, and not only when I am present with you.
My little children, of whom I travail in birth again until Christ be formed in you,
I desire to be present with you now, and to change my voice; for I GR am perplexed about.stand in doubt of you.
Tell me, ye that desire to be under the law, do ye not hear the law?
For it is written, that Abraham had two sons, the one by a Gen. 16:2 (1–3); D&C 132:30 (30–34), 65; Abr. 2:9 (9–11).bondmaid, the other by a freewoman.
But he who was of the bondwoman was born after the flesh; but he of the freewoman was by promise.
Which things are an allegory: for these are the two covenants; the one from the mount Sinai, which gendereth to TG Law of Moses.bondage, which is Gen. 16:1.Agar.
For this Agar is mount Sinai in Arabia, and answereth to Jerusalem which now is, and is in bondage with her children.
But TG Jerusalem, New.Jerusalem which is above is free, which is the mother of us all.
For it is written, Gen. 21:6.Rejoice, thou TG Barren.barren that bearest not; break forth and cry, thou that travailest not: for the desolate hath many more children than she which hath an husband.
Now we, brethren, as Isaac was, are the Gal. 3:29. TG Mission of Early Saints; Seed of Abraham.children of promise.
But as then he that was born after the TG Man, Natural, Not Spiritually Reborn.flesh Gen. 21:9.persecuted him that was born after the Spirit, even so it is now.
Nevertheless what saith the scripture? Gen. 21:10.Cast out the bondwoman and her son: for the son of the bondwoman shall not be heir with the son of the freewoman.
So then, brethren, we are not children of the bondwoman, but of the free.

div.p: Stand fast in gospel liberty—Seek faith, love, Christ, and the Spirit—The works of the flesh and the fruits of the Spirit are named.

chapter.verse: Philip. 4:1 (1–7).Stand fast therefore in the TG Liberty.liberty wherewith Christ hath made us 2 Ne. 2:26 (26–27); Mosiah 5:8; Alma 61:9 (9, 21).free, and be not D&C 88:86.entangled again with the yoke of TG Bondage, Spiritual; Law of Moses.bondage.
Behold, I Paul say unto you, that if ye be circumcised, Christ shall profit you nothing.
For I testify again to every man that is Rom. 2:25.circumcised, that he is a debtor to do the whole law.
Christ is become of no effect unto you, whosoever of you are justified by the TG Law of Moses.law; ye are fallen from TG Grace.grace.
For we through the Spirit wait for the hope of righteousness by Rom. 5:2 (1–5); 1 Pet. 1:21 (21–22).faith.
For in Jesus Christ neither TG Circumcision.circumcision GR has any power, validity, service.availeth any thing, nor uncircumcision; but TG Faith.faith which worketh by TG Love.love.
Ye did run well; who did hinder you that ye should not TG Disobedience.obey the truth?
This persuasion cometh not of him that calleth you.
A little leaven leaveneth the whole lump.

I have TG Dependability.confidence in you through the Lord, that ye GR will take no other view, will not have a different opinion.will be none otherwise minded: but he that Gal. 1:7.troubleth you shall bear his judgment, whosoever he be.
And I, brethren, if I yet preach circumcision, why do I yet suffer persecution? then is the GR stumbling block, cause of misery.offence of the cross ceased.
I would they were even TG Excommunication.cut off which Gal. 1:8 (8–9).trouble you.
For, brethren, ye have been called unto TG Abundant Life; Liberty.liberty; only use not liberty for an occasion to the flesh, but by love TG Self-Sacrifice.serve one another.
For all the Rom. 13:10 (8–10); 1 Tim. 1:5. TG God, Law of.law is fulfilled in one word, even in this; Thou shalt TG Love.love thy neighbour as thyself.
But if ye bite and devour one another, take heed that ye be not consumed one of another.
This I say then, TG Walking with God.Walk in the TG Guidance, Divine.Spirit, and ye shall not fulfil the TG Chastity; Lust.lust of the flesh.
For the flesh lusteth against the TG Holy Ghost, Loss of.Spirit, and the Spirit against the flesh: and these are contrary the one to the other: so that ye cannot do the things that ye would.
But if ye be D&C 20:45; 28:4; 42:13.led of the Spirit, ye are not under the Acts 15:5 (1–11); Mosiah 13:29 (29–31).law.
Now the works of the Mosiah 16:3 (3–5); D&C 67:12 (10–12).flesh are manifest, which are these; Adultery, TG Fornication.fornication, TG Uncleanness.uncleanness, lasciviousness,
Idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, TG Strife.strife, seditions, heresies,

TG Envy.Envyings, murders, TG Drunkenness; Word of Wisdom.drunkenness, TG Rioting and Reveling.revellings, and such like: of the which I tell you before, as I have also told you in time past, that they which do such things shall not inherit the kingdom of God.

But the Rom. 8:23. TG Holy Ghost, Mission of.fruit of the TG Inspiration; Spirituality.Spirit is Col. 3:12.love, TG Joy.joy, TG Contentment; Peace of God.peace, TG Forbear.longsuffering, TG Benevolence; Kindness.gentleness, goodness, TG Faith.faith,
TG Meek.Meekness, GR self-control. TG Temperance.temperance: against such there is no law.
And they that are Christ’s have crucified the flesh with the GR sufferings, afflictions, passions.affections and lusts.
If we live in the Spirit, let us also walk in the Spirit.
Let us not be desirous of vain glory, TG Provoking.provoking one another, envying one another.

div.p: Bear one another’s burdens—As you sow, so shall you reap—Be not weary in well-doing.

chapter.verse: Brethren, if a man be Rom. 14:1; D&C 20:80.overtaken in a GR transgression, trespass.fault, ye which are spiritual, Heb. 12:13.restore such an one in the spirit of meekness; GR watching.considering thyself, lest thou also be tempted.
Bear ye one another’s TG Compassion.burdens, and so fulfil the law of Christ.
For if a man think himself to be something, when he is nothing, he deceiveth himself.
But let every man TG Test.prove his own TG Good Works.work, and then shall he have rejoicing in himself alone, and not in another.
For every man shall Prov. 9:12.bear his own burden.
Let him that is taught in the word TG Communication.communicate unto him that teacheth in all good things.
Be not TG Deceit.deceived; God is not TG Mocking.mocked: for whatsoever a man Ezek. 32:27. TG Accountability; Agency; Good Works.soweth, that shall he also Ps. 7:16. TG Harvest.reap.
For he that soweth to his flesh shall of the flesh reap corruption; but he that soweth to the Spirit shall of the Spirit reap life everlasting.
And let us not be Luke 8:14 (14–15); 2 Thes. 3:13; D&C 64:33. TG Steadfastness.weary in well doing: for in due season we shall TG Abundant Life.reap, if we faint not.
As we have therefore opportunity, let us do Prov. 3:27.good unto all men, especially unto them who are of the household of faith.
Ye see how large a letter I have written unto you with mine own hand.
As many as desire to make a fair shew in the flesh, they constrain you to be circumcised; only lest they should suffer TG Persecution.persecution for the cross of Christ.
For neither they themselves who are circumcised keep the law; but desire to have you circumcised, that they may glory in your flesh.
But God forbid that I should glory, save in the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ, by whom the world is crucified unto me, and I unto the world.
For in Christ Jesus neither TG Circumcision.circumcision availeth any thing, nor uncircumcision, but a new creature.
And as many as walk according to this rule, Ps. 125:5.peace be on them, and mercy, and upon the Israel of God.
From henceforth let no man trouble me: for I bear in my body the marks of the Lord Jesus.
Brethren, the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit. Amen.

div.title: The Epistle of Paul the Apostle
to the

div.p: The Saints are foreordained to receive the gospel—The gospel is to be restored in the latter days—The Saints are sealed by the Holy Spirit of Promise—They know God and Christ by revelation.

chapter.verse: Paul, an apostle of Jesus Christ by the will of God, to the TG Saints.saints which are at Ephesus, and to the faithful in Christ Jesus:
Grace be to you, and peace, from God our Father, and from the Lord Jesus Christ.
Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who hath blessed us with all TG Spirituality.spiritual blessings in heavenly places in Christ:

According as he hath TG Election; Foreordination.chosen us in him TG Man, Antemortal Existence of.before the foundation of the world, that we should be TG Holiness.holy and without blame before him in love:

Having GR foreordained. Eph. 1:11. TG Foreordination.predestinated us unto the TG Sons and Daughters of God.adoption of children by Jesus Christ to himself, according to the good pleasure of his will,
To the praise of the glory of his grace, wherein he hath made us accepted in the beloved.

In whom we have TG Jesus Christ, Atonement through; Jesus Christ, Redeemer; Redemption.redemption through his blood, the TG Forgive.forgiveness of sins, according to the TG Treasure.riches of his TG Grace.grace;
Wherein he hath abounded toward us in all TG God, Omniscience of.wisdom and TG Prudence.prudence;
Having made known unto us the Eph. 3:4; D&C 107:19.mystery of his TG God, Will of.will, according to his good pleasure which he hath purposed in himself:

That in the TG Dispensations; Last Days; Restoration of the Gospel.dispensation of the fulness of times he might TG Israel, Gathering of.gather together in one TG Jesus Christ, Power of.all things in Christ, both which are in heaven, and which are on earth; even in him:
In whom also we have obtained an inheritance, being Eph. 1:5.predestinated according to the purpose of him who worketh all things after the counsel of his own will:
That we should be to the praise of his glory, who GR trusted, hoped beforehand.first trusted in Christ.

In whom ye also trusted, after that ye heard the word of truth, the D&C 93:51. TG Gospel.gospel of your salvation: in whom also after that ye believed, ye were TG Sealing.sealed with that holy Spirit of TG Promise.promise,
Which is the earnest of our inheritance until the redemption of the purchased possession, unto the praise of his glory.
Wherefore I also, after I heard of your Col. 1:4 (4–5).faith in the Lord Jesus, and love unto all the saints,
Cease not to give thanks for you, making mention of you in my prayers;
That the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, may give unto you the spirit of TG Wisdom.wisdom and TG Revelation.revelation in the knowledge of him:

The eyes of your TG Understanding.understanding being D&C 6:15; 11:13. TG Education.enlightened; that ye may know what is the hope of his calling, and what the TG Treasure.riches of the glory of his TG Inheritance.inheritance in the saints,
And what is the exceeding greatness of his Col. 2:12.power to us-ward who believe, according to the working of his mighty power,
Which he wrought in Christ, when he Acts 2:32; 1 Cor. 15:20 (14–20).raised him from the dead, and set him at his own right hand in the Heb. 7:26.heavenly places,
Far above all principality, and power, and might, and dominion, and every Heb. 1:4. TG Name.name that is named, not only in this world, but also in that which is to come:

And hath put TG Jesus Christ, Power of.all things under his Heb. 2:8.feet, and gave him to be the TG Jesus Christ, Head of the Church; Jesus Christ, Messiah.head over all things to the TG Church.church,
Which is his body, the fulness of him that filleth all in all.

div.p: We are saved by grace through faith—The blood of Christ saves Jew and Gentile alike—The Church is built upon the foundation of apostles and prophets.

chapter.verse: And you hath he quickened, who were Col. 1:21; Rev. 3:1.dead in trespasses and sins;

Wherein in time past ye walked according to the course of this TG Worldliness.world, according to the prince of the power of the air, the spirit that now worketh in the children of D&C 121:17. TG Disobedience.disobedience:

Among whom also we all had our conversation in times past in the TG Lust.lusts of our flesh, fulfilling the desires of the flesh and of the mind; and were by TG Man, Natural, Not Spiritually Reborn.nature the children of wrath, even as others.
But God, who is rich in TG God, Mercy of.mercy, for his great love wherewith he loved us,
Even when we were dead in sins, hath TG Resurrection.quickened us together with Christ, (by grace ye are saved;)
And hath raised us up together, and made us sit together in heavenly places in Christ Jesus:
That in the ages to come he might shew the exceeding TG Treasure.riches of his grace in his kindness toward us through Christ Jesus.

For by Alma 22:14 (13–14); 42:14 (10–25); D&C 20:30 (29–34). TG Grace.grace are ye TG Salvation; Salvation, Plan of.saved through TG Faith.faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the TG God, Gifts of.gift of God:
Not of works, lest any man should TG Boast.boast.
For we are his Ps. 100:3; Isa. 60:21; D&C 29:25.workmanship, created in Christ Jesus unto good TG Good Works.works, which God hath before ordained that we should TG Walking with God.walk in them.
Wherefore remember, that ye being in time past Gentiles in the flesh, who are called TG Circumcision.Uncircumcision by that which is called the Circumcision in the flesh made by hands;

That at that time ye were without Christ, being aliens from the commonwealth of Israel, and TG Stranger.strangers from the TG Covenants.covenants of promise, having no 1 Thes. 4:13.hope, and 1 Thes. 4:5; Mosiah 27:31; Alma 41:11.without God in the world:
But now in Christ Jesus ye who sometimes were far off are made nigh by the blood of Christ.
For he is our TG Peace; Peace of God.peace, who hath made both one, and hath broken down the middle TG Veil.wall of partition between us;

Having Col. 2:14.abolished in his flesh the enmity, even the law of commandments contained in TG Ordinance.ordinances; for to make in himself of twain one TG Man, New, Spiritually Reborn.new man, so making peace;
And that he might TG Jesus Christ, Atonement through.reconcile both unto God in one body by the cross, having slain the enmity thereby:
And came and preached peace to you which were afar off, and to them that were nigh.
For through him we both have access by one Spirit unto the Father.

Now therefore ye are no more TG Gentiles; Stranger.strangers and foreigners, but TG Citizenship; Fellowshipping.fellowcitizens with the TG Saints.saints, and of the TG Sons and Daughters of God.household of God;
And are built upon the foundation of the TG Apostles; Church Organization.apostles and TG Prophets, Mission of.prophets, Jesus Christ himself being the chief TG Cornerstone.corner stone ;
In whom all the building fitly framed together groweth unto an holy temple in the Lord:
In whom ye also are builded together for an habitation of God through the Spirit.

div.p: The Gentiles are fellow heirs with Israel—The love of Christ surpasses all understanding.

chapter.verse: For this cause I Paul, the prisoner of Jesus Christ for you Gentiles,
If ye have heard of the TG Dispensations.dispensation of the grace of God which is given me to you-ward:
How that by revelation he made Col. 1:27 (26–27).known unto me the mystery; (as I TG Scriptures, Lost.wrote afore in few words,
Whereby, when ye read, ye may understand my knowledge in the Rom. 16:25; Eph. 1:9 (9–11).mystery of Christ)
Which in other ages was not made known unto the sons of men, as it is now TG Revelation.revealed unto his holy apostles and TG Prophets, Mission of.prophets by the Spirit;
That the TG Gentiles.Gentiles should be fellowheirs, and of the same body, and partakers of his promise in Christ by the gospel:
Whereof I was made a minister, according to the gift of the grace of God given unto me by the effectual working of his power.
Unto me, who am less than the least of all saints, is this TG Grace.grace given, that I should preach among the Gentiles the unsearchable TG Treasure.riches of Christ;

And to make all men see what is the fellowship of the TG Mysteries of Godliness.mystery, which from the beginning of the world hath been hid in God, who TG Creation; God, Creator; Jesus Christ, Creator.created all things by TG Jesus Christ, Jehovah.Jesus Christ:
To the intent that now unto the principalities and powers in heavenly places might be known by the church the manifold wisdom of God,
According to the eternal TG Earth, Purpose of.purpose which he purposed in Christ Jesus our Lord:
In whom we have boldness and access with confidence by the faith of him.
Wherefore I desire that ye faint not at my tribulations for you, which is your glory.
For this cause I bow my knees unto the TG Godhead.Father of our Lord Jesus Christ,
Of whom the whole TG Family.family in heaven and earth is named,
That he would grant you, according to the TG Treasure.riches of his glory, to be Col. 1:11. TG Strength.strengthened with might by his Spirit in the inner man;
That Christ may dwell in your hearts by faith; that ye, being Col. 2:7.rooted and Col. 1:23.grounded in love,
May be able to comprehend with all saints what is the breadth, and length, and depth, and height;
And to know the TG God, Love of.love of Christ, which passeth knowledge, that ye might be filled with all the fulness of God.
Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us,
Unto him be glory in the church by Christ Jesus throughout all ages, D&C 76:112.world without end. Amen.

div.p: There is one Lord, one faith, and one baptism—Apostles and prophets are essential to the Church—The Saints are exhorted to live righteously—They are sealed unto the day of redemption.

chapter.verse: I therefore, the prisoner of the Lord, beseech you that ye walk TG Worthiness.worthy of the GR calling.vocation wherewith ye are called,
With all lowliness and meekness, with longsuffering, TG Forbear.forbearing one another in love;
Endeavouring to keep the TG Unity.unity of the Spirit in the bond of peace.
There is one TG Church.body, and one Spirit, even as ye are called in one hope of your calling;
One Lord, one 1 Cor. 14:33; Eph. 4:13; D&C 1:30. TG Gospel.faith, one TG Baptism, Essential; Baptism, Immersion.baptism,
One God and Mal. 2:10; 1 Cor. 8:6. TG God the Father, Elohim.Father of all, who is above all, and through all, and in you all.
But unto every one of us is given TG Grace.grace according to the measure of the gift of Christ.
Wherefore he saith, When he Ps. 68:18; Acts 1:9; D&C 88:6.ascended up on high, he led captivity captive, and gave gifts unto men.
(Now that he ascended, what is it but that he also descended first into the lower parts of the earth?
He that descended is the same also that TG Jesus Christ, Ascension of.ascended up far above all heavens, that he might fill all things.)

And he TG Authority.gave some, TG Apostles; Church Organization; Priesthood, History of.apostles; and some, TG Prophets, Mission of.prophets; and some, Acts 21:8; 2 Tim. 4:5. TG Patriarch.evangelists; and some, TG Bishop.pastors and TG Teacher.teachers;
For the TG Priesthood, Magnifying Callings within.perfecting of the saints, for the work of the ministry, for the TG Edification.edifying of the body of Christ:

Till we all come in the 1 Cor. 1:10; 14:33; Eph. 4:5 (3–6); 3 Ne. 11:28 (28–30); D&C 1:30; 38:27.unity of the faith, and of the TG Learn.knowledge of the Son of God, unto a TG God, Perfection of; Man, Potential to Become like Heavenly Father; Perfection.perfect man, unto the measure of the stature of the fulness of Christ:

That we henceforth be no more 1 Cor. 14:20.children, tossed to and fro, and carried about with every wind of Heb. 13:9.doctrine, by the sleight of men, and cunning craftiness, whereby they lie in wait to deceive;
But speaking the TG Reproof.truth in love, may grow up into him in all things, which is the Col. 2:19. TG Jesus Christ, Head of the Church.head, even Christ:

From whom the whole body fitly joined together and compacted by that which every joint supplieth, according to the effectual working in the measure of every part, maketh increase of the body unto the edifying of itself in love.
This I say therefore, and testify in the Lord, that ye henceforth walk not as other 1 Thes. 4:5.Gentiles walk, in the TG Vanity.vanity of their TG Mind.mind,

Having the D&C 10:2. TG Understanding.understanding darkened, being alienated from the life of God through the TG Ignorance.ignorance that is in them, because of the GR hardness. TG Spiritual Blindness.blindness of their TG Hardheartedness.heart:
Who being 1 Ne. 17:45.past TG Conscience.feeling have given themselves over unto lasciviousness, to work all uncleanness with greediness.
But ye have not so learned Christ;
If so be that ye have heard him, and have been taught by him, as the truth is in Jesus:
That ye Col. 3:8.put off concerning the former conversation the Rom. 6:6 (1–7).old man, which is corrupt according to the deceitful TG Lust.lusts;
And be renewed in the spirit of your mind;
And that ye put on the TG Man, New, Spiritually Reborn; Mission of Early Saints.new man, which after God is created in TG Righteousness.righteousness and true holiness.
Wherefore putting away TG Lying.lying, speak every man TG Honesty; Truth.truth with his neighbour: for we are members one of another.
JST Eph. 4:26 Can ye be angry, and not sin? …Be ye angry, and sin not: let not the sun go down upon your TG Anger.wrath:
Neither give place to the Mosiah 2:32 (32–33); 3 Ne. 11:29.devil.

Let him that stole TG Stealing.steal no more: but rather let him TG Labor; Work, Value of.labour, working with his hands the thing which is good, that he may have to Prov. 21:26.give to him that needeth.
Let no corrupt TG Communication; Gossip; Profanity.communication proceed out of your mouth, but that which is good to the use of edifying, that it may minister grace unto the hearers.
And Gen. 6:6.grieve not the holy TG God, Spirit of.Spirit of God, whereby ye are TG Sealing.sealed unto the day of redemption.
Let all bitterness, and wrath, and TG Anger.anger, and clamour, and TG Backbiting.evil TG Slander.speaking, be put away from you, with all TG Malice.malice:
And be ye TG Benevolence; Courtesy; Family, Love within; Kindness.kind one to another, tenderhearted, TG Forgive.forgiving one another, even as God for Christ’s sake hath forgiven you.

div.p: The Saints are exhorted to avoid uncleanness and walk uprightly—Husbands and wives should love each other.

chapter.verse: Be ye therefore GR imitators. 1 Cor. 11:1; Philip. 3:17 (13–21). TG God, the Standard of Righteousness; Jesus Christ, Exemplar.followers of God, as dear children;

And TG Walking with God.walk in love, as Christ also hath loved us, and hath given himself for us an Heb. 8:3.offering and a TG Self-Sacrifice.sacrifice to God for a sweetsmelling Gen. 8:21; Lev. 1:9.savour.
But TG Chastity; Fornication; Sexual Immorality.fornication, and all uncleanness, or covetousness, let it not be once named among you, as becometh TG Saints.saints;
Neither TG Filthiness.filthiness, nor TG Levity.foolish Eccl. 5:2; Matt. 12:36.talking, nor jesting, which are not convenient: but rather giving of thanks.

For this ye know, that no TG Chastity; Whore.whoremonger, nor TG Uncleanness.unclean person, nor covetous man, who is an idolater, hath any TG Inheritance; Worthiness.inheritance in the kingdom of Christ and of God.
Let no man TG Deceit.deceive you with vain words: for because of these things cometh the TG God, Indignation of.wrath of God upon the children of TG Disobedience.disobedience.
Be not ye therefore partakers with them.
For ye were sometimes darkness, but now are ye light in the Lord: walk as TG Children of Light.children of Rom. 12:2.light:
(For the fruit of the Spirit is in all TG Good Works.goodness and righteousness and truth;)
Proving what is acceptable unto the Lord.
And have no Gen. 49:6; Ps. 1:1 (1–2); Prov. 1:10 (10–19).fellowship with the unfruitful works of TG Darkness, Spiritual.darkness, but rather TG Reproof.reprove them.
For it is a TG Shame.shame even to speak of those things which are done of them in secret.
But all things that are reproved are made manifest by the light: for whatsoever doth make manifest is light.
Wherefore he saith, Awake thou that sleepest, and arise from the dead, and Christ shall give thee TG Jesus Christ, Light of the World; Light [noun].light.
See then that ye walk circumspectly, not as fools, but as wise,
Redeeming the time, because the days are evil.
Wherefore be ye not TG Wisdom.unwise, but understanding what the will of the Lord is.
And be not TG Drunkenness; Word of Wisdom.drunk with wine, wherein is TG Temperance.excess; but be filled with the Spirit;
Speaking to yourselves in psalms and TG Singing.hymns and spiritual songs, singing and making 2 Kgs. 3:15.melody in your heart to the Lord;
Giving TG Thanksgiving.thanks always for all things unto God and the Father in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ;
TG Reconciliation.Submitting yourselves one to another in the fear of God.
TG Marriage, Continuing Courtship in.Wives, Esth. 1:20 (20–22). TG Submissiveness.submit yourselves unto your own husbands, as unto the Lord.
For the TG Marriage, Husbands.husband is the head of the wife, even as Christ is the TG Jesus Christ, Head of the Church.head of the TG Church.church: and he is the saviour of the body.
Therefore as the church is subject unto Christ, so let the wives be to their own husbands in every thing.
TG Family, Patriarchal.Husbands, TG Family, Love within; Love.love your TG Marriage, Continuing Courtship in.wives, even as Christ also loved the church, and gave himself for it;
That he might TG Sanctification.sanctify and TG Purification.cleanse it with the washing of water by the word,
That he might present it to himself a glorious church, not having spot, or wrinkle, or any such thing; but that it should be holy and without blemish.
So ought men to love their wives as their own bodies. He that loveth his TG Marriage, Wives.wife loveth himself.
For no man ever yet TG Hate.hated his own TG Body, Sanctity of.flesh; but nourisheth and cherisheth it, even as the Lord the church:
For we are 1 Cor. 6:15.members of his body, of his flesh, and of his bones.
For this cause shall a man leave his father and mother, and shall be joined unto his wife, and they two shall be TG Marriage, Celestial; Unity.one flesh.
This is a great TG Mysteries of Godliness.mystery: but I speak concerning Christ and the church.
Nevertheless let every one of you in particular so love his wife even as himself; and the TG Marriage, Wives.wife see that she TG Courtesy; Respect.reverence her husband.

div.p: Children should honor their parents—Servants and masters are judged by the same law—Saints should put on the whole armor of God.

chapter.verse: TG Children.Children, TG Counsel; Family, Children, Duties of; Respect.obey your parents in the Lord: for this is right.
TG Honoring Father and Mother.Honour thy father and mother; (which is the first commandment with promise;)
That it may be well with thee, and thou mayest live long on the earth.

And, ye TG Family, Love within; Family, Patriarchal; Marriage, Fatherhood.fathers, TG Provoking.provoke not your TG Family, Children, Responsibilities toward.children to wrath: but bring them up in the nurture and admonition of the Lord.
Titus 2:9.Servants, be obedient to them that are your 1 Pet. 2:18 (13–25).masters according to the flesh, with fear and trembling, in singleness of your heart, as unto Christ;
Not with eyeservice, as menpleasers; but as the 1 Cor. 7:22 (21–24).servants of Christ, doing the TG God, Will of.will of God from the heart;
With good will doing TG Service.service, as to the Lord, and not to men:
Knowing that whatsoever good thing any man doeth, the same shall he Col. 3:24.receive of the Lord, whether he be bond or free.

And, ye Mal. 3:5; Col. 4:1.masters, do the same things unto them, forbearing threatening: knowing that your TG Leadership.Master also is in heaven; neither is there Moro. 8:12; D&C 38:16.respect of persons with him.
Finally, my brethren, be TG Strength.strong in the Lord, and in the power of his might.

Put on the whole Ps. 91:4; Rom. 13:12; 2 Cor. 10:4 (3–6); 1 Thes. 5:8; D&C 27:15 (15–18). TG Chastity; Protection, Divine; Watch.armour of God, that ye may be able to stand against the wiles of the devil.

For we JS—H 1:15 (15–17).wrestle not TG Opposition.against TG Flesh and Blood.flesh and blood, but against principalities, against powers, against the 2 Cor. 4:4.rulers of the TG Darkness, Spiritual; Secret Combinations.darkness of this world, against spiritual TG Governments; Wickedness.wickedness in high places.
Wherefore take unto you the whole armour of God, that ye may be able to withstand in the evil day, and having done all, to stand.
Stand therefore, having your loins Isa. 11:5.girt about with TG Truth.truth, and having on the Isa. 59:17; 61:10.breastplate of TG Righteousness.righteousness;
And your feet shod with the preparation of the gospel of TG Peace of God.peace;
Above all, taking the shield of TG Faith.faith, wherewith ye shall be able to quench all the fiery 1 Ne. 15:24; D&C 3:8.darts of the wicked.
And take the helmet of TG Salvation.salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God:
TG Prayer.Praying always with all prayer and supplication in the Spirit, and watching thereunto with all TG Perseverance.perseverance and supplication for all saints;
And for me, that utterance may be given unto me, that I may open my mouth boldly, to make known the TG Mysteries of Godliness.mystery of the gospel,
For which I am an ambassador in bonds: that therein I may speak D&C 60:2 (2–3).boldly, as I ought to speak.
But that ye also may know my affairs, and how I do, Acts 20:4.Tychicus, a beloved brother and faithful minister in the Lord, shall make known to you all things:
Whom I have sent unto you for the same purpose, that ye might know our affairs, and that he might comfort your hearts.
Peace be to the brethren, and love with faith, from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
Grace be with all them that love our Lord Jesus Christ in TG Sincere.sincerity. Amen.

div.title: The Epistle of Paul the Apostle
to the

div.p: All that happened to Paul furthered the gospel cause—Our conduct should be worthy of the gospel.

chapter.verse: Paul and Timotheus, the TG Servant.servants of Jesus Christ, to all the saints in Christ Jesus which are at Philippi, with the TG Bishop; Church Organization.bishops and TG Deacon.deacons:
Grace be unto you, and peace, from God our Father, and from the Lord Jesus Christ.
I thank my God upon every remembrance of you,
Always in every prayer of mine for you all making request with joy,
For your fellowship in the gospel from the first day until now;
Being confident of this very thing, that he which hath begun a good work in you will GR complete, accomplish.perform it until the day of Jesus Christ:

Even as it is GR just, right.meet for me to think this of you all, because I have you in my heart; inasmuch as both in my bonds, and in the defence and GR establishment, strengthening.confirmation of the gospel, ye all are partakers of my TG Grace.grace.
For God is my GR witness.record, how greatly I long after you all in the GR affections, compassions.bowels of Jesus Christ.
And this I pray, that your Moses 7:18.love may abound yet more and more in knowledge and in all judgment;
That ye may GR prove, put to the test.approve things that are excellent; that ye may be GR pure, spotless.sincere and without offence till the day of Christ;
Being filled with the fruits of TG Righteousness.righteousness, which are by Jesus Christ, unto the glory and praise of God.
But I would ye should understand, brethren, that the things which happened unto me have GR come.fallen out rather unto the furtherance of the gospel;
So that my bonds in Christ are manifest in all the Philip. 4:22.palace, and in all other places;
And many of the brethren in the Lord, waxing confident by my bonds, are much more bold to speak the word without Luke 1:74 (68–75); 1 Jn. 4:18 (15–18); D&C 68:6 (5–6).fear.
Some indeed preach Christ even of envy and TG Strife.strife; and some also of good will:
The one preach Christ of contention, not sincerely, supposing to add affliction to my bonds:
But the other of love, knowing that I am set for the defence of the gospel.
What then? notwithstanding, every way, whether in pretence, or in truth, Christ is preached; and I therein do rejoice, yea, and will rejoice.
For I know that this shall turn to my salvation through your 2 Cor. 1:11; Philem. 1:22.prayer, and the supply of the TG God, Spirit of.Spirit of Jesus Christ,

According to my earnest expectation and my Ps. 119:116.hope, that in nothing I shall be ashamed, but that with all boldness, as always, so now also Christ shall be Ps. 34:3 (1–3).magnified in my body, whether it be by life, or by death.
For to me to live is Christ, and to die is gain.
But if I live in the flesh, this is the fruit of my labour: yet what I shall choose I GR know.wot not.
For I am GR hard-pressed to choose.in a strait betwixt two, having a desire to depart, and to be with Christ; which is far better:
Nevertheless to 3 Ne. 28:9 (1–12); D&C 7:5 (1–8).abide in the flesh is more needful for you.
And having this confidence, I know that I shall abide and continue with you all for your furtherance and joy of faith;
That your rejoicing may be more abundant in Jesus Christ for me by my coming to you again.

Only let your conversation be as it becometh the gospel of Christ: that whether I come and see you, or else be absent, I may hear of your affairs, that ye Philip. 4:1 (1–7).stand fast in one spirit, with TG Unity.one TG Mind.mind Jude 1:3.striving together for the faith of the gospel;

And in nothing terrified by your adversaries: JST Philip. 1:28 … who reject the gospel, which bringeth on them destruction; but you who receive the gospel, salvation; and that of God.which is to them an evident token of perdition, but to you of salvation, and that of God.
For unto you it is given in the behalf of Christ, not only to believe on him, but also to TG Suffering.suffer for his sake;
Having the same conflict which ye saw in me, and now hear to be in me.

div.p: Saints should be of one mind and one spirit—Every knee will bow to Christ—Saints must work out their salvation—Paul faces martyrdom with joy.

chapter.verse: If there be therefore any consolation in Christ, if any comfort of love, if any fellowship of the Spirit, if any GR tender affections of the heart and compassion.bowels and mercies,
Fulfil ye my joy, that ye be likeminded, having the same TG Benevolence.love, being of TG Unity.one Rom. 12:10 (10–18); Moses 7:18 (18–21).accord, of one mind.
Let nothing be done through TG Strife.strife or vainglory; but in lowliness of mind let each TG Humility; Love; Respect.esteem other better than themselves.
Look not every man on his own things, but every man also on the things of others.
Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus:
Who, being in the TG God, Body of, Corporeal Nature; Man, Physical Creation of.form of God, thought it not robbery to be TG Jesus Christ, Relationships with the Father.equal with God:
But made himself of no reputation, and took upon him the form of a Isa. 53:4 (3–7); 2 Cor. 8:9 (8–15); Heb. 2:9.servant, and was made in the likeness of men:

And being found in GR outward appearance.fashion as a man, he TG Humility; Meek.humbled himself, and became Isa. 50:5.obedient unto TG Jesus Christ, Death of.death, even the TG Jesus Christ, Atonement through.death of the cross.
Wherefore God also hath highly TG Exaltation.exalted him, and given him a Mal. 1:11; Heb. 1:4. TG Name.name which is above every name:
That at the Mosiah 27:31; D&C 76:110 (106–11); 88:104 (103–4).name of Jesus every Isa. 45:23; Rom. 14:11.knee should bow, of things in heaven, and things in earth, and things under the earth;
And that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is TG Jesus Christ, Messiah.Lord, to the glory of God the Father.

Wherefore, my beloved, as ye have always obeyed, not as in my presence only, but now much more in my absence, Alma 34:37; Morm. 9:27. TG Good Works.work out your own TG Salvation.salvation with fear and trembling.
For it is God which worketh in you both to will and to do of his good pleasure.
Do all things without murmurings and TG Disputations.disputings:

That ye may be blameless and harmless, the TG Sons and Daughters of God.sons of God, without rebuke, in the midst of a crooked and perverse GR generation.nation, among whom ye TG Mission of Early Saints.shine as lights in the world;
Holding forth the word of life; that I may rejoice in the day of Christ, that I have not run in vain, neither laboured in vain.
Yea, and if I be 1 Thes. 2:8; D&C 98:13.offered upon the sacrifice and service of your faith, I joy, and rejoice with you all.
For the same cause also do ye joy, and rejoice with me.
But I trust in the Lord Jesus to send Timotheus shortly unto you, that I also may be of good comfort, when I know your state.
For I have no man likeminded, who will naturally care for your state.
For all TG Apathy.seek their 1 Cor. 10:24.own, not the things which are Jesus Christ’s.
But ye know the GR trial.proof of him, that, as a son with the father, he hath served with me in the gospel.
Him therefore I hope to send presently, so soon as I shall see how it will go with me.
But I trust in the Lord that I also myself shall come shortly.
Yet I supposed it necessary to send to you Philip. 4:18.Epaphroditus, my brother, and companion in labour, and fellowsoldier, but your messenger, and he that ministered to my wants.
For he longed after you all, and was full of heaviness, because that ye had heard that he had been sick.
For indeed he was sick nigh unto death: but God had mercy on him; and not on him only, but on me also, lest I should have sorrow upon sorrow.
I sent him therefore the more carefully, that, when ye see him again, ye may rejoice, and that I may be the less sorrowful.
Receive him therefore in the Lord with all TG Cheerful.gladness; and 1 Thes. 5:13.hold such in GR honor.reputation:
Because for the work of Christ he was nigh unto death, not regarding his life, to supply your Philip. 4:10.lack of service toward me.

div.p: Paul sacrifices all things for Christ—True ministers set examples of righteousness.

chapter.verse: Finally, my brethren, rejoice in the Lord. To write the same things to you, to me indeed is not grievous, but for you it is safe.
Beware of dogs, beware of evil workers, beware of the concision.
For we are the TG Circumcision.circumcision, which TG Worship.worship God in the spirit, and rejoice in Christ Jesus, and have no confidence in the TG Trust Not in the Arm of Flesh.flesh.
Though I might also have confidence in the flesh. If any other man thinketh that he hath whereof he might trust in the flesh, I more:
Circumcised the eighth day, of the stock of Israel, of the tribe of Benjamin, an 2 Cor. 11:22.Hebrew of the Hebrews; as touching the law, a Acts 23:6.Pharisee;
Concerning zeal, persecuting the church; touching the righteousness which is in the law, blameless.
But what things were gain to me, those I counted loss for Christ.

Yea doubtless, and I count all things but loss for the excellency of the knowledge of Christ Jesus my Lord: for whom I have TG Self-Sacrifice; Suffering.suffered the Omni 1:26; Mosiah 2:34.loss of all things, and do count them but GR refuse.dung, that I may win Christ,
And be found in him, not having mine own righteousness, which is of the law, but that which is through the faith of Christ, the TG Righteousness.righteousness which is of God by faith:
That I may know him, and the power of his resurrection, and the 2 Cor. 1:4; 2 Thes. 2:16.fellowship of his sufferings, being made conformable unto his death;
If by any means I might attain unto the resurrection of the JST Philip. 3:11 … just.dead.
Not as though I had already attained, either were already TG Perfection.perfect: but I GR press forward.follow after, if that I may apprehend that for which also I am apprehended of Christ Jesus.
Brethren, I count not myself to have apprehended: but this one thing I do, forgetting those things which are behind, and reaching forth unto those things which are before,
I TG Steadfastness.press toward the mark for the TG Objectives.prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.
Let us therefore, as many as be Moro. 10:32 (32–33).perfect, be thus minded: and if in any thing ye be otherwise minded, God shall reveal even this unto you.
Nevertheless, whereto we have already attained, let us walk by the same rule, let us mind the same thing.
Brethren, be Matt. 16:24 (24–26); Eph. 5:1; 1 Thes. 1:6.followers together of me, and mark them which walk so as ye have us for an TG Example.ensample.
(For many walk, of whom I have told you often, and now tell you even weeping, that they are the enemies of the cross of Christ:
Whose 2 Cor. 11:15.end is destruction, whose God is their belly, JST Philip. 3:19 … and who glory in their shame …and whose glory is in their TG Shame.shame, who mind earthly things.)
For our conversation is in heaven; from whence also we look for the TG Jesus Christ, Savior.Saviour, the Lord Jesus Christ:

Who shall 1 Cor. 15:51. TG Jesus Christ, Resurrection.change our GR humble, of low estate.vile body, TG Resurrection.that it may be fashioned like unto his glorious TG God, Body of, Corporeal Nature.body, according to the working whereby he is able even to 1 Cor. 15:28; D&C 19:2; 76:106.subdue all things unto himself.

div.p: Stand fast in the Lord—We believe in being honest, true, and chaste.

chapter.verse: Therefore, my brethren dearly beloved and longed for, my joy and crown, so 1 Cor. 10:12; 16:13 (13–14); Gal. 5:1; Philip. 1:27; D&C 87:8.stand fast in the Lord, my dearly beloved.
I beseech Euodias, and beseech Syntyche, that they be of the same mind in the Lord.

And I entreat thee also, true GR associate.yokefellow, help those women which laboured with me in the gospel, with Clement also, and with other my fellowlabourers, whose names are in the TG Book of Life.book of life.
Rejoice in the Lord alway: and again I say, Rejoice.
Let your GR gentleness. TG Modesty; Temperance.moderation be known unto all men. The Lord is at hand.

GR Don’t be unduly concerned about anything.Be JST Philip. 4:6 … afflicted … Ps. 55:22; Prov. 16:3; Matt. 6:25.careful for nothing; but in every thing by TG Prayer.prayer and supplication with TG Thanksgiving.thanksgiving let your requests be made known unto God.
And the TG Peace of God.peace of God, which passeth all TG Understanding.understanding, shall GR guard.keep your hearts and minds through Christ Jesus.

Finally, brethren, whatsoever things are TG Truth.true, whatsoever things are TG Honesty.honest, whatsoever things are TG Righteousness.just, whatsoever things are TG Purity.pure, whatsoever things are TG Beauty.lovely, A of F 1:13.whatsoever things are of good report; if there be any TG Chastity; Virtue.virtue, and if there be any praise, TG Motivations; Study.think on these things.
Those things, which ye have both learned, and 1 Thes. 4:1.received, and heard, and seen in me, do: and the God of peace shall be with you.
But I rejoiced in the Lord greatly, that now at the last your 2 Cor. 11:9.care of me hath flourished again; wherein ye were also careful, but ye Philip. 2:30 (25, 30).lacked opportunity.
Not that I speak in respect of want: for I have learned, in whatsoever state I am, therewith to be TG Contentment.content.
I know both how to be GR humble. TG Self-Sacrifice.abased, and I know how to abound: every where and in all things I am instructed both to be full and to be hungry, both to abound and to suffer need.
I can do all things through John 15:5 (4–5).Christ which 1 Tim. 1:12; Alma 26:12 (11–13).strengtheneth me.
Notwithstanding ye have well done, that ye did GR participate.communicate with my affliction.
Now ye Philippians know also, that in the beginning of the gospel, when I departed from Macedonia, no church communicated with me as concerning giving and receiving, but ye only.
For even in Thessalonica ye sent once and again unto my necessity.
Not because I desire a gift: but I desire Rom. 15:28 (25–28); Titus 3:14.fruit that may abound to your account.

But I have all, and 2 Cor. 9:8.abound: I am full, having received of Philip. 2:25 (25–30).Epaphroditus the things which were sent from you, an odour of a sweet smell, a sacrifice acceptable, wellpleasing to God.
But my God shall supply all your Ps. 23:1.need according to his TG Treasure.riches in glory by Christ Jesus.
Now unto God and our Father be glory for ever and ever. Amen.
Salute every saint in Christ Jesus. The brethren which are with me greet you.
All the saints salute you, chiefly they that are of Philip. 1:13.Cæsar’s household.
The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.

div.title: The Epistle of Paul the Apostle
to the

div.p: Redemption comes through Christ—He created all things, is in the image of God, and is the Firstborn of the Father.

chapter.verse: Paul, an apostle of Jesus Christ by the will of God, and Timotheus our brother,
To the saints and faithful brethren in Christ which are at Colosse: Grace be unto you, and peace, from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
We give thanks to God and the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, praying always for you,
Since we heard of your Eph. 1:15 (12–15); 1 Thes. 5:8.faith in Christ Jesus, and of the Heb. 6:10.love which ye have to all the saints,
For the 1 Pet. 1:4.hope which is laid up for you in heaven, whereof ye heard before in the word of the truth of the TG Gospel.gospel;

Which is come unto you, JST Col. 1:6 … as in all generations of the world …as it is in all the world; and bringeth forth Alma 32:42 (28–42); 3 Ne. 14:16; D&C 52:34 (18, 34).fruit, as it doth also in you, since the day ye heard of it, and knew the TG Grace.grace of God in truth:
As ye also learned of Col. 4:12 (12–13); Philem. 1:23.Epaphras our dear fellowservant, who is for you a faithful minister of Christ;
Who also declared unto us your love in the Spirit.

For this cause we also, since the day we heard it, do not cease to pray for you, and to desire that ye might be filled with the TG Knowledge.knowledge of his TG God, Will of.will in all wisdom and spiritual TG Understanding.understanding;
That ye might TG Walking with God.walk TG Worthiness.worthy of the Lord unto all 1 Thes. 4:1.pleasing, being fruitful in every good work, and increasing in the TG Education.knowledge of God;
Eph. 3:16.Strengthened with all might, according to his TG Glory.glorious TG Jesus Christ, Power of.power, unto all patience and longsuffering with Acts 5:41 (40–41). TG Joy.joyfulness;
Giving Col. 3:17.thanks unto the Father, which hath GR qualified us.made us meet to be partakers of the 2 Ne. 9:18; D&C 45:58 (57–58); 84:38 (33–38).inheritance of the saints in light:
Who hath delivered us from the power of D&C 21:6; 38:11.darkness, and hath translated us into the TG Kingdom of God, in Heaven.kingdom of his dear TG Jesus Christ, Divine Sonship.Son:
In whom we have TG Jesus Christ, Atonement through; Redemption.redemption through his blood, even the TG Remission of Sins.forgiveness of sins:
Who is the TG God, Body of, Corporeal Nature.image of the invisible TG Godhead.God, the TG Firstborn; Jesus Christ, Firstborn.firstborn of GR all creation.every creature:

For by him were all Heb. 2:10 (9–10).things TG Creation.created, that are in heaven, and that are in earth, visible and invisible, whether they be thrones, or dominions, or Col. 2:10; 1 Pet. 3:22.principalities, or powers: all things were TG Jesus Christ, Creator.created by him, and for him:
And he is before all things, and by him all things D&C 88:13 (5–13).consist.

And he is the TG Jesus Christ, Head of the Church.head of the body, the church: who is the beginning, the TG Jesus Christ, Firstborn; Jesus Christ, Resurrection.firstborn from the dead; that in all things he might have the preeminence.
For it pleased the Father that in him should all TG Jesus Christ, Relationships with the Father.fulness dwell;
And, having made peace through the blood of his cross, by him to TG Reconciliation.reconcile all things unto himself; by him, I say, whether they be things in earth, or things in heaven.
And you, that were GR formerly.sometime Eph. 2:1.alienated and enemies in your mind by wicked works, yet now hath he reconciled
In the body of his flesh through TG Jesus Christ, Death of.death, to present you holy and Mosiah 3:21; D&C 4:2.unblameable and unreproveable in his sight:

If ye TG Perseverance.continue in the faith GR established and steadfast. Eph. 3:17 (17–19).grounded and settled, and be not John 15:6.moved away from the TG Hope.hope of the gospel, which ye have heard, and which was preached to every creature which is under heaven; whereof I Paul am made a minister;
Who now rejoice in my sufferings for you, and fill up that which is behind of the 2 Cor. 1:5.afflictions of Christ in my flesh for his body’s sake, which is the church:
Whereof I am made a minister, according to the TG Dispensations.dispensation of God which is given to me for you, to fulfil the word of God;
Even the Rom. 16:25 (25–26). TG Mysteries of Godliness.mystery which hath been hid from ages and from generations, but now is made 2 Tim. 1:10.manifest to his saints:
To whom God would make Eph. 3:3.known what is the TG Treasure.riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles; which is Christ in you, the hope of glory:
Whom we TG Preaching.preach, TG Warn.warning every man, and teaching every man in all wisdom; that we may present every man perfect in Christ Jesus:
Whereunto I also labour, striving according to his working, which worketh in me mightily.

div.p: The fulness of the Godhead dwells in Christ—Beware of being deceived by the traditions of men—The handwriting against us was nailed to the cross of Christ.

chapter.verse: For I would that ye knew what great GR anguish.conflict I have for you, and for them at Col. 4:15 (12–16); Rev. 1:11.Laodicea, and for as many as have not seen my face in the flesh;

That their hearts might be comforted, being knit together in love, and unto all riches of the full assurance of TG Understanding.understanding, to the acknowledgement of the mystery of God, JST Col. 2:2 … and of Christ, who is of God, even the Father;and of the Father, and of Christ;
In whom are hid all the TG Treasure.treasures of 1 Cor. 2:7 (6–7). TG God, Intelligence of; God, Omniscience of.wisdom and TG Knowledge.knowledge.
And this I say, lest any man should beguile you with enticing words.
For though I be absent in the flesh, yet am I with you in the spirit, joying and beholding your TG Order.order, and the steadfastness of your faith in Christ.
As ye have therefore received Christ Jesus the Lord, so TG Walking with God.walk ye in him:
Eph. 3:17.Rooted and built up in him, and stablished in the faith, as ye have been taught, abounding therein with TG Thanksgiving.thanksgiving.

Beware lest any man Heb. 13:9.spoil you through D&C 123:12. TG Learn.philosophy and vain TG Deceit; Education; Fraud.deceit, after the TG Traditions of Men.tradition of men, after the rudiments of the TG Worldliness.world, and not after Christ.
For in him dwelleth all the TG Jesus Christ, Relationships with the Father.fulness of the Godhead bodily.
And ye are John 1:16.complete in him, which is the head of all Col. 1:16; 1 Pet. 3:22.principality and power:
In whom also ye are circumcised with the TG Circumcision.circumcision made without hands, in putting off the Rom. 6:6.body of the sins of the flesh by the circumcision of Christ:

TG Jesus Christ, Types of, in Memory.Buried with him in TG Baptism; Baptism, Immersion.baptism, wherein also ye are Col. 3:1.risen with him through the faith of the Eph. 1:19 (19–20).operation of God, who hath raised him from the dead.
And you, being dead in your sins and the uncircumcision of your flesh, hath he GR caused to become alive. TG Resurrection.quickened together with him, having forgiven you all trespasses;
Eph. 2:15.Blotting out the handwriting of ordinances that was against us, which was contrary to us, and took it out of the way, nailing it to his cross;
And having spoiled principalities and powers, he made a shew of them openly, triumphing over them in it.
Let no man therefore Rom. 14:3 (1–3).judge you in TG Word of Wisdom.meat, or in drink, or in respect of an holyday, or of the new moon, or of the TG Sabbath.sabbath days:
Which are a TG Jesus Christ, Types of, in Anticipation.shadow of things to come; but the body is of Christ.
