For Christ also hath once TG Jesus Christ, Atonement through; Jesus Christ, Redeemer; Pain; Redemption.suffered for sins, the just for the TG Injustice.unjust, that he might bring us to God, being put to TG Death; Jesus Christ, Death of.death in the flesh, but quickened by the TG God, Spirit of.Spirit:

By which also he went and TG Genealogy and Temple Work; Preaching.preached unto the TG Salvation for the Dead; Spirit Body; Spirits, Disembodied; Spirits in Prison.spirits in Luke 1:79 (77–79); D&C 138:8 (5–10, 18). TG Hell.prison;

TG Earth, Cleansing of.Noah, while the ark was a preparing, wherein few, that is, eight souls were Gen. 8:1; Heb. 11:7; 2 Pet. 2:5.saved by TG Flood.water.

The like figure whereunto even TG Baptism; Baptism, Essential.baptism doth also now save us (not the putting away of the filth of the flesh, but the answer of a good conscience toward God,) by the resurrection of Jesus Christ:
Who is gone into John 7:34.heaven, and is on the right hand of God; TG Angels.angels and Col. 1:16; 2:10. TG Authority.authorities and powers being made subject unto him.

div.p: Peter explains why the gospel is preached to the dead—Saints should speak as the oracles of God—The righteous will be tried and tested in all things.

chapter.verse: Forasmuch then as Christ hath suffered for us in the flesh, arm yourselves likewise with the same GR intent, idea, thought.mind: JST 1 Pet. 4:2 For you who have suffered in the flesh should cease from sin, that you no longer the rest of your time in the flesh, should live to the lusts of men, but to the will of God.for he that hath suffered in the flesh hath ceased from TG Sin.sin;
That he no longer should live the rest of his time in the flesh to the TG Lust.lusts of men, but to the will of God.

Use TG Hospitality.hospitality one to another without TG Motivations.grudging.
As every man hath received the gift, even so TG Priesthood, Magnifying Callings within.minister the same one to another, as good TG Stewardship.stewards of the manifold grace of God.

If any man 1 Thes. 2:4; Titus 2:1.speak, let him speak as the TG Authority; Teaching with the Spirit.oracles of God; if any man minister, let him do it as of the ability which God giveth: that God in all things may be glorified through Jesus Christ, to whom be praise and dominion for ever and ever. Amen.
Beloved, think it not strange concerning the fiery TG Test.trial which is to try you, as though some strange thing happened unto you:
But Acts 5:41.rejoice, inasmuch as ye are TG Persecution.partakers of Christ’s TG Suffering.sufferings; that, when his glory shall be D&C 66:2.revealed, ye may be glad also with exceeding joy.

If ye be TG Reproach.reproached for the name of Christ, TG Happiness.happy are ye; for the spirit of glory and of God resteth upon you: on their part he is evil spoken of, but on your part he is glorified.
But let none of you suffer as a murderer, or as a thief, or as an evildoer, or as a busybody in other men’s matters.
Yet if any man suffer as a Acts 11:26 (19–26).Christian, let him not be ashamed; but let him glorify God on this behalf.
For the time is come that TG Judgment.judgment must begin at the house of God: and if it first begin at us, what shall the end be of them that D&C 18:46. TG Disobedience.obey not the gospel of God?
And if the TG Righteousness.righteous scarcely be saved, where shall the TG Godliness.ungodly and the sinner appear?
Wherefore let them that suffer according to the TG God, Will of.will of God commit the TG Refuge.keeping of their souls to him in well doing, as unto a faithful Creator.

div.p: The elders are to feed the flock of God—Humility and godly graces lead to perfection.

chapter.verse: The TG Elder, Melchizedek Priesthood; Leadership.elders which are among you I exhort, who am also an elder, and a witness of the sufferings of Christ, and also a D&C 66:2; 93:22.partaker of the glory that shall be revealed:

Neither as being D&C 121:41 (41–42).lords over God’s heritage, but being TG Example.ensamples to the flock.

Likewise, ye younger, TG Respect; Submissiveness.submit yourselves unto the elder. Yea, all of you be subject one to another, and be clothed with TG Humility.humility: for God GR opposes, is adverse to.resisteth the TG Pride.proud, and giveth grace to the TG Poor in Spirit.humble.
TG Contrite Heart.Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of God, that he may exalt you in due time:
Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you.
Be TG Levity.sober, be TG Watch.vigilant; because your adversary the TG Devil.devil, as a roaring lion, walketh about, seeking whom he may devour:
Whom resist TG Perseverance; Steadfastness.steadfast in the faith, knowing that the same afflictions are GR laid upon, endured by.accomplished in your brethren that are in the world.
But the God of all TG Grace.grace, who hath called us unto his eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after that ye have suffered a while, make you TG Worthiness.perfect, stablish, strengthen, settle you.
To him be glory and dominion for ever and ever. Amen.

By Acts 15:34 (32–34); 2 Cor. 1:19; 1 Thes. 1:1.Silvanus, a faithful brother unto you, as I suppose, I have written briefly, exhorting, and testifying that this is the true grace of God wherein ye stand.
The church that is at TG Babylon.Babylon, elected together with you, saluteth you; and so doth Marcus my son.
Greet ye one another with a kiss of charity. Peace be with you all that are in Christ Jesus. Amen.

div.p: Peter urges the Saints to make their calling and election sure—Prophecy comes by the power of the Holy Ghost.

According as his divine power hath given unto us D&C 76:55 (53–60).all things that pertain unto D&C 45:8.life and TG Godliness.godliness, through the knowledge of him that hath called us GR through, by.to glory and TG Virtue.virtue:

And to knowledge GR self-control. TG Temperance.temperance; and to temperance TG Patience.patience; and to patience GR reverence, piety, godliness.godliness;
And to godliness TG Brotherhood and Sisterhood.brotherly TG Benevolence; Kindness.kindness; and to brotherly kindness TG Charity.charity.

For if these things be in you, and TG Abundant Life.abound, they make you that ye shall neither be GR idle, unprofitable, injurious. TG Barren.barren nor D&C 107:31 (30–31).unfruitful in the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.
But he that lacketh these things is blind, and cannot see afar off, and hath forgotten that he was purged from his old sins.
Wherefore the rather, brethren, give diligence to make your calling and TG Election.election sure: for if ye do these things, ye shall never D&C 50:44.fall:
For so an entrance shall be ministered unto you abundantly into the TG Immortality.everlasting TG Kingdom of God, on Earth.kingdom of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ.
Wherefore I will not be negligent to put you always in remembrance of these things, though ye know them, and be established in the present truth.
Yea, I think it GR right, just, righteous.meet, as long as I am in this D&C 93:4, 35.tabernacle, to stir you up by putting you in remembrance;
Knowing that shortly I must put off this my tabernacle, even as our Lord Jesus Christ hath John 21:19 (18–19).shewed me.
Moreover I will endeavour that ye may be able after my decease to have these things always in remembrance.

For we have not followed cunningly devised 1 Tim. 1:4.fables, when we made known unto you the power and coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, but were Matt. 17:2 (1–9); John 1:14. TG Witness.eyewitnesses of his majesty.
For he received from God the Father honour and glory, when there came such a voice to him from the excellent glory, This is my TG Witness of the Father.beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased.

For the TG Prophecy; Scriptures, Value of; Scriptures, Writing of.prophecy came not in old time by the will of man: but holy men of God TG Holy Ghost, Mission of.spake as they were TG Inspiration.moved by the TG Holy Ghost, Gifts of.Holy Ghost.

div.p: False teachers among the Saints are damned—Lustful Saints will perish in their own corruption.

But chiefly them that TG Walking in Darkness.walk after the flesh in the TG Lust; Sexual Immorality.lust of TG Uncleanness.uncleanness, and despise GR constituted authority. TG Governments.government. TG Boast.Presumptuous are they, selfwilled, they are not afraid to speak evil of dignities.

Having eyes full of adultery, and that cannot cease from sin; beguiling unstable souls: an heart they have exercised with covetous practices; cursed children:

Which have TG Apostasy of Individuals.forsaken the right Hag. 1:7.way, and are gone Prov. 21:16; Isa. 53:6.astray, following the way of Num. 22:5; Deut. 23:4; Rev. 2:14 (12–17).Balaam the son of Bosor, who loved the TG Selfishness; Wages.wages of unrighteousness;

But it is happened unto them according to the true proverb, The dog is turned to his own Prov. 26:11. TG Apostasy of Individuals; Apostasy of the Early Christian Church.vomit again; and the sow that was TG Wash.washed to her wallowing in the mire.

div.p: Some in the latter days will doubt the Second Coming—The elements will melt at the coming of the Lord.

chapter.verse: This second epistle, beloved, I now TG Scriptures, Writing of.write unto you; in both which I stir up your pure minds by way of Alma 5:6 (3–13).remembrance:
That ye may be mindful of the words which were spoken before by the holy 1 Pet. 1:10. TG Prophets, Mission of.prophets, and of the commandment of us the apostles of the Lord and Saviour:
JST 2 Pet. 3:3–13 (Appendix).Knowing this first, that there shall come in the TG Last Days.last days scoffers, walking after their own TG Lust; Selfishness.lusts,
And saying, D&C 45:26.Where is the Matt. 16:3 (1–5).promise of his Isa. 5:19 (18–19).coming? for since the fathers fell asleep, all things continue as they were from the beginning of the creation.
For this they willingly are TG Ignorance.ignorant of, that by the TG Jesus Christ, Creator.word of God the heavens were of old, and the TG Creation.earth standing out of the water and in the water:
Whereby the world that then was, being TG Flood.overflowed with Gen. 7:19.water, perished:

But the heavens and the earth, which are now, by the same word are kept in store, reserved unto TG Earth, Cleansing of.fire against the day of judgment and TG Death, Spiritual, Second; Sons of Perdition.perdition of ungodly men.
But, beloved, be not ignorant of this one thing, that one day is with the Lord as a thousand Alma 40:8; Abr. 3:4 (4–9). TG Time.years, and a thousand years as one day.

The Lord is not slack concerning his promise, as some men count slackness; but is TG Forbear.longsuffering to us-ward, not willing that any should Ezek. 18:23 (23–24).perish, but that all should come to TG Repent.repentance.

But the TG Day of the Lord.day of the Lord will TG Jesus Christ, Second Coming.come as a thief in the night; in the which the heavens shall Ps. 102:26 (25–26); Isa. 51:6.pass away with a great noise, and the TG World, End of.elements shall melt with fervent heat, the TG Earth, Destiny of.earth also and the works that are therein shall be burned up.
Seeing then that all these things shall be dissolved, what 3 Ne. 27:27.manner of persons ought ye to be in all holy 1 Pet. 1:15.conversation and godliness,

D&C 35:15; 49:23.Looking for and TG Haste.hasting unto the Heb. 9:28; Rev. 1:7; D&C 39:23.coming of the D&C 45:30.day of God, wherein the heavens being on fire shall be dissolved, and the elements shall melt with fervent heat?
Nevertheless we, according to his promise, look for new TG Heaven.heavens and a TG Earth, Renewal of; Millennium.new Ether 13:9.earth, wherein dwelleth TG Righteousness.righteousness.
Wherefore, beloved, seeing that ye look for such things, be D&C 88:63; 101:38. TG Dedication; Diligence.diligent that ye may be found of him in peace, without D&C 38:31.spot, and blameless.
And GR count, regard.account that the TG Forbear.longsuffering of our Lord is salvation; even as our beloved brother Paul also according to the wisdom given unto him hath written unto you;

As also in all his epistles, speaking in them of these things; in which are some things hard to be understood, which they that are unlearned and unstable GR twist, distort. 1 Ne. 13:29 (24–29); Alma 13:20; D&C 10:63.wrest, as they do also the other TG Scriptures, Preservation of.scriptures, unto their own destruction.

Ye therefore, beloved, JST 2 Pet. 3:17 … seeing ye know before the things which are coming, beware lest …seeing ye know these things before, beware lest ye also, being 2 Ne. 28:14 (3–14).led TG Apostasy of the Early Christian Church.away with the error of the wicked, fall from your own TG Steadfastness.steadfastness.
But grow in TG Grace.grace, and in the knowledge of our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ. To him be glory both now and for ever. Amen.

div.p: The Saints gain fellowship with God by obedience—We must confess our sins to gain forgiveness.

chapter.verse: JST 1 Jn. 1:1 Brethren, this is the testimony which we give of that which was from the beginning …That which was from the John 1:2 (1–4, 14).beginning, which we have heard, which we have seen with our eyes, which we have looked upon, and our hands have handled, of the TG Jesus Christ, Messenger of the Covenant.Word of life;

(For the life was manifested, and we have seen it, and bear witness, and GR declare, announce, bring tidings.shew unto you that John 17:3; 1 Jn. 5:20.eternal life, which was with the Father, and was manifested unto us;)

That which we have TG Witness.seen and heard declare we unto you, that ye also may have fellowship with us: and truly our TG Fellowshipping.fellowship is with the Moses 6:68.Father, and with his Son Jesus Christ.
And these things TG Scriptures, Writing of.write we unto you, that your joy may be full.

This then is the message which we have heard of him, and declare unto you, that God is John 8:12. TG God, Perfection of; Light [noun].light, and in him is no TG Darkness, Spiritual; Walking in Darkness.darkness at all.
If we say that we have fellowship with him, and TG Walking in Darkness.walk in 2 Ne. 15:20.darkness, we lie, and do not the truth:

But if we TG Walking with God.walk in the light, as he is in the light, we have fellowship one with another, and the Acts 20:28; Rev. 7:14; D&C 29:17. TG Blood, Symbolism of.blood of Jesus Christ his Son Rev. 12:11 (10–12); D&C 50:28. TG Jesus Christ, Atonement through.cleanseth us from all sin.
If we say that we have Prov. 30:20.no TG Sin.sin, we TG Lying.deceive ourselves, and the truth is not in us.

If we TG Confession; Repent.confess our sins, he is faithful and TG God, Justice of; Justice.just to TG Forgive.forgive us our sins, and to TG Purification; Purity.cleanse us from all unrighteousness.
If we say that we have Prov. 28:13.not sinned, we make him a liar, and his word is not in us.

div.p: Christ is our Advocate with the Father—We know God by obedience—Love not the world—Anti-Christs will come in the last days.

chapter.verse: My little children, these things write I unto you, that ye sin not. JST 1 Jn. 2:1 … But if any man sin and repent, we have an advocate …And if any man sin, we have an GR intercessor, helper, comforter. TG Jesus Christ, Authority of; Jesus Christ, Relationships with the Father; Salvation, Plan of.advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ the righteous:

And he is the TG Jesus Christ, Atonement through; Jesus Christ, Redeemer; Jesus Christ, Savior; Redemption; Remission of Sins.propitiation for our sins: and not for ours only, but also for the sins of the whole Alma 11:41 (40–41); D&C 21:9; 76:41 (41–43).world.
And hereby we do know that we know him, if we 1 Jn. 3:22 (22–24); 5:3 (2–3).keep his commandments.
He that saith, I know him, and keepeth not his 1 Jn. 3:6.commandments, is a TG Lying.liar, and the truth is not in him.
But whoso TG Obedience.keepeth his word, in him verily is the love of God perfected: hereby know we that we are 2 Cor. 5:17.in him.
He that saith he John 15:4.abideth in him ought himself also so to Matt. 11:29; 2 Ne. 31:12 (12–13); Moro. 7:4 (3–4); D&C 19:23.walk, even as he walked.

JST 1 Jn. 2:7 Brethren, I write a new commandment unto you, but it is the same commandment which ye had from the beginning …Brethren, I write no new commandment unto you, but an old commandment which ye had from the beginning. The old commandment is the word which ye have heard from the beginning.

Again, a new commandment I write unto you, JST 1 Jn. 2:8 … which thing was of old ordained of God; and is true in him, and in you …which thing is true in him and in you: because the TG Darkness, Spiritual.darkness is GR passing away.past, and the true 2 Ne. 3:5; D&C 50:24.light now shineth.
He that saith he is in the light, and hateth his brother, is in darkness even until now.
He that D&C 95:12. TG Family, Love within; Love.loveth his TG Brotherhood and Sisterhood.brother abideth in the light, and there is none occasion of stumbling in him.
But he that hateth his brother is in darkness, and TG Walking in Darkness.walketh in darkness, and knoweth not whither he goeth, because that darkness hath blinded his eyes.

I TG Scriptures, Writing of.write unto you, little Mosiah 5:7; Moses 6:52.children, because your sins are forgiven you GR because of, through His name.for his 1 Sam. 12:22; Ps. 23:3; Acts 4:12; 1 Ne. 20:9.name’s sake.

I write unto you, fathers, because ye have known him that is from the beginning. I write unto you, young men, because ye have overcome the wicked one. I write unto you, little children, because ye have known the Father.

I have written unto you, fathers, because ye have known him that is from the beginning. I have written unto you, young men, because ye are strong, and the word of God abideth in you, and ye have overcome the wicked one.
Love not the TG World.world, neither the things that are in the TG Worldliness.world. If any man love the world, the D&C 95:12.love of the Father is not in him.

For all that is in the world, the TG Chastity; Lust; Sensuality.lust of the flesh, and the lust of the eyes, and the GR haughtiness, ostentation. TG Pride.pride of life, is not of the Father, but is of the Mark 7:21 (21–22).world.
And the 1 Cor. 7:31 (29–31).world TG World, End of.passeth away, and the lust thereof: but he that doeth the TG God, Will of.will of God Ps. 125:1; 3 Ne. 14:21.abideth for ever.

Little children, it is the last time: and as ye have heard that TG Antichrist; False Prophets.antichrist shall come, even now are there many TG Apostasy of the Early Christian Church.antichrists; whereby we know that it is the last time.

They went out from us, but they were not of us; for if they had been of us, they would no doubt have continued with us: but they went out, that they might be made manifest that they were not all of us.
But ye have an GR anointing.unction from the TG Holiness.Holy One, and ye know all things.
I have not written unto you because ye know not the truth, but because ye know it, and that no lie is of the truth.
Who is a Alma 5:39 (38–40).liar but he that denieth that Jesus is the Christ? He is TG Antichrist.antichrist, that denieth the Father and the Son.
Whosoever denieth the Son, the same hath not the Father: [but] he that John 14:7. acknowledgeth the Son hath the Father also.

Let that therefore abide in you, which ye have heard from the beginning. If that which ye have heard from the 2 Jn. 1:6.beginning shall remain in you, ye also shall continue in the Son, and in the Father.
And this is the D&C 88:4. TG Promise.promise that he hath promised us, even John 17:3 (2–3); 2 Ne. 31:20.eternal life.
These things have I written unto you concerning them that GR deceive, lead astray, cause to wander.seduce you.

But the anointing which ye have received of him abideth in you, and ye need not that any man D&C 43:15.teach you: but as the same TG Anointing.anointing John 6:45; 1 Thes. 4:9.teacheth you of all things, and is truth, and is no lie, and even as it hath taught you, ye shall abide in him.
And now, little children, abide in him; that, when he shall appear, we may have confidence, and not be ashamed before him at his coming.
If ye know that he is righteous, ye know that every one that doeth TG Righteousness.righteousness is TG Man, New, Spiritually Reborn.born of him.

div.p: The sons of God will become like Christ—Love for others is required to gain eternal life—Obedience ensures us an answer to our prayers.

chapter.verse: Behold, what manner of TG God, Love of.love the Father hath bestowed upon us, that we should be called the GR children, people. Isa. 56:5.sons of God: therefore the TG World.world knoweth us not, because it knew him not.

Beloved, now are we the GR children, people. TG Sons and Daughters of God.sons of God, and it doth not yet appear what we shall be: but we know that, when he shall Col. 3:4. TG God, Body of, Corporeal Nature.appear, we shall be Alma 5:19 (14, 19); Moro. 7:48 (47–48). TG Eternal Life; Man, Potential to Become like Heavenly Father; Resurrection.like him; for we shall Job 19:26 (25–27). TG God, Privilege of Seeing.see him as he is.
And every man that hath this TG Hope; Motivations.hope in him TG Chastity; Purification; Purity.purifieth himself, even as he is 2 Cor. 5:21; 1 Pet. 1:16 (15–19); 2 Ne. 31:5 (5–7).pure.
Whosoever committeth sin TG Transgress.transgresseth also the law: for TG Sin.sin is the transgression of the law.
And ye know that he was manifested to take away our TG Forgive; Jesus Christ, Atonement through; Jesus Christ, Redeemer.sins; and in him is no sin.
Whosoever abideth in him TG Sin.sinneth not: JST 1 Jn. 3:6 … whosoever continueth in sin hath not seen …whosoever sinneth hath not seen him, neither 1 Jn. 2:4.known him.
Little children, let no man deceive you: he that doeth righteousness is righteous, even as he is righteous.

He that JST 1 Jn. 3:8 … continueth in sin …committeth TG Sin.sin is of the devil; for the devil Gen. 3:1.sinneth from the beginning. For this purpose the Son of God was manifested, that he might destroy the works of the TG Devil.devil.

Whosoever is TG Man, New, Spiritually Reborn.born of God JST 1 Jn. 3:9 … doth not continue in sin; for the Spirit of God remaineth in him; and he cannot continue in sin, because he is born of God, having received that holy Spirit of promise.doth not commit sin; for his seed remaineth in him: and he cannot sin, because he is born of God.

In this the children of God are GR conspicuous, apparent.manifest, and the John 8:44; Acts 13:10.children of the devil: whosoever doeth not Matt. 7:20.righteousness is not of God, neither he that loveth not his brother.
For this is the GR precept, doctrine.message that ye heard from the beginning, that we should love one another.
Not as Jude 1:11 (7–13).Cain, who was of that wicked one, and slew his brother. And wherefore slew he him? Because his own works were evil, and his brother’s righteous.
Marvel not, my brethren, if the world hate you.

We know that we have passed from death unto John 5:24.life, because we love the 1 Cor. 8:12; 1 Tim. 6:2; D&C 45:5; 108:7. TG Brotherhood and Sisterhood.brethren. He that TG Love.loveth not his brother abideth in TG Death, Spiritual, First.death.
Whosoever Ps. 109:5 (3–5). TG Hate.hateth his brother is a murderer: and ye know that no TG Life, Sanctity of; Murder.murderer hath eternal life abiding in him.

Hereby perceive we the John 10:15 (14–15); 15:13; 1 Ne. 11:22 (22, 25).love of JST 1 Jn. 3:16 … Christ … God , because he laid down his life for us: and we ought to lay down our lives for the brethren.

But whoso hath this world’s good, and seeth his 1 Jn. 4:20 (20–21).brother have Luke 3:11.need, and GR is hardhearted, void of compassion. TG Hardheartedness.shutteth up his bowels of Mosiah 4:22 (22–25). TG Compassion. compassion from him, how dwelleth the love of God in him?
My little children, let us not love in word, JST 1 Jn. 3:18 … neither in tongue only …neither in tongue; but in TG Good Works.deed and in truth.
And hereby we know that we are of the truth, and shall assure our hearts before him.
For if our heart condemn us, God is greater than our heart, and TG God, Intelligence of.knoweth all things.
Beloved, if our heart condemn us not, then have we Alma 5:27.confidence toward God.
And whatsoever we TG Prayer.ask, we receive of him, because we 1 Jn. 2:3.keep his TG Good Works.commandments, and do those things that are pleasing in his sight.

And this is his TG Commandments of God.commandment, That we should TG Faith.believe on the 2 Ne. 25:20; Mosiah 3:17; D&C 11:30; 20:29. TG Jesus Christ, Taking the Name of.name of his Son Jesus Christ, and TG Family, Love within.love one another, as he gave us commandment.

And he that keepeth his commandments John 6:56; Rom. 8:9; 1 Cor. 2:16; 2 Cor. 13:5; 1 Jn. 4:13 (7–21).dwelleth in him, and he in him. And hereby we know that he John 14:23.abideth in us, by the 1 Cor. 2:10; 1 Thes. 4:8.Spirit which he hath given us.

div.p: Try the spirits—God is love and dwells in those who love Him.

chapter.verse: Beloved, believe not every Moro. 7:12 (12–17).spirit, but GR test, prove by trial, discern. 1 Thes. 5:21; D&C 11:12 (12–14); 50:31 (1–3, 31–35); 129:9 (1–9).try the TG Spirits, Evil or Unclean.spirits whether they are of God: because many TG Apostasy of the Early Christian Church; False Prophets.false prophets are gone out into the world.
Hereby TG Discernment, Spiritual.know ye the TG God, Spirit of.Spirit of God: Every spirit that confesseth that Jesus Christ is come in the TG Flesh and Blood.flesh is of God:

And every spirit that confesseth not that Jesus Christ is come in the flesh is D&C 50:32.not of God: and this is that spirit of TG Antichrist.antichrist, whereof ye have heard that it should come; and even now already is it in the world.
Ye are of God, little children, and have overcome them: because greater is he that is in you, than he that is in the world.
They are of the TG Worldliness.world: therefore speak they of the world, and the world heareth them.

We are of God: he that knoweth God John 8:47; 13:20; D&C 1:38 (14, 37–38); 29:7; 84:36 (35–39).heareth us; he that is not of God heareth not us. Hereby TG Discernment, Spiritual.know we the TG Holy Ghost, Mission of.spirit of truth, and the spirit of GR deception, wandering, sin.error.
Beloved, let us TG Love.love one another: for TG God, Love of.love is of God; and every one that loveth is TG Man, New, Spiritually Reborn.born of God, and knoweth God.
He that loveth not John 17:3.knoweth not God; for God is love.
In this was manifested the love of God toward us, because that God sent his only begotten Son into the world, that we might John 3:16.live through him.

Herein is love, not that we loved God, but that he 2 Thes. 2:16.loved us, and TG Jesus Christ, Authority of.sent his Son to be the TG Jesus Christ, Atonement through; Jesus Christ, Redeemer.propitiation for our sins.
Beloved, if God so loved us, we ought also to love one another.

JST 1 Jn. 4:12 No man hath seen God at any time, except them who believe …No man hath D&C 93:1; 110:2 (1–3); Abr. 3:11 (11–12); JS—H 1:17 (16–17).seen God at any time. If we love one another, 2 Cor. 13:5.God 1 Cor. 2:16.dwelleth in us, and his love is perfected in us.
Hereby know we that we 1 Jn. 3:24.dwell in him, and he in us, because he hath given us of his Spirit.
And we have seen and do TG Witness.testify that the Father TG Jesus Christ, Authority of.sent the Son to be the TG Jesus Christ, Savior.Saviour of the D&C 66:1.world.
Whosoever shall TG Testimony.confess that Jesus is the Son of God, God dwelleth in him, and he in God.
And we have known and believed the love that God hath to us. God is love; and he that D&C 42:45.dwelleth in love dwelleth in God, and God in him.
Herein is our love made perfect, that we may have boldness in the day of judgment: because as he TG Jesus Christ, Exemplar.is, so are we in this world.

There is no Philip. 1:14 (12–17); D&C 50:41 (41, 42). TG Courage; Fearful.fear in TG Family, Love within.love; but perfect TG Love.love casteth out fear: because fear hath GR correction, punishment.torment. He that feareth is not made perfect in love.
We TG Love.love him, because he first loved us.

If a man say, I love God, and TG Family, Love within; Hate.hateth his TG Brotherhood and Sisterhood.brother, he is a TG Lying.liar: for he that loveth not his 1 Jn. 3:17 (10–18).brother whom he hath seen, how can he love God whom he hath not TG God, Privilege of Seeing.seen?
And this commandment have we from him, That he who TG Fellowshipping; Love.loveth God love his brother also.

div.p: Saints are born of God through belief in Christ—Water, blood, and the Spirit testify of Christ—Belief in Christ is required in order to gain eternal life.

chapter.verse: Whosoever believeth that Jesus is the Christ is born of God: and every one that loveth him that begat loveth him also that is begotten of him.
By this we know that we TG Family, Love within.love the TG Sons and Daughters of God.children of God, when we love God, and keep his commandments.
For this is the TG God, the Standard of Righteousness.love of God, that we 1 Jn. 2:3.keep his commandments: and his commandments are not GR burdensome, oppressive. Matt. 11:30.grievous.
For whatsoever is Rom. 12:2 (1–2).born of God Rev. 3:21; D&C 64:2.overcometh the world: and this is the 1 Cor. 15:57.victory that overcometh the world, even our faith.
Who is he that Rev. 2:7 (1–7).overcometh the world, but he that believeth that Jesus is the Son of God?

This is he that TG Jesus Christ, Condescension of.came by water and blood, even Jesus Christ; not by water only, but by water and blood. And it is the D&C 1:39.Spirit that beareth TG Holy Ghost, Mission of.witness, because the Spirit is truth.
For there are three that bear record in heaven, the TG Godhead.Father, the Word, and the Holy Ghost: and these three are TG Unity.one.
And there are three that bear witness in earth, the Moses 6:59 (59–60).Spirit, and the water, and the TG Blood, Symbolism of.blood: and these three agree in one.
If we receive the D&C 6:23 (22–24).witness of men, the TG Witness.witness of God is greater: for this is the TG Witness of the Father.witness of God which he hath testified of his Son.

He that TG Faith.believeth on the Son of God hath the TG Testimony.witness in himself: he that believeth not God hath made him a liar; because he believeth not the GR testimony, witness.record that God gave of his Son.
And this is the record, that God hath given to us TG Eternal Life.eternal life, and this John 1:4; 2 Tim. 1:10.life is in his Son.
He that hath the Son hath life; and he that hath not the Son of God hath not life.

These things have I John 20:31. TG Record Keeping.written unto you that believe on the name of the Son of God; that ye may know that ye have eternal 2 Ne. 31:20.life, and that ye may believe on the name of the Son of God.
And this is the confidence that we have in him, that, if we ask any thing according to his TG God, Will of.will, he Ps. 4:1 (1, 3).heareth us:
And if we know that he hear us, whatsoever we TG Prayer.ask, we know that we have the petitions that we Ps. 145:19.desired of him.

If any man see his brother sin a sin which is not unto death, he shall ask, and he shall give him life for them that sin not unto death. There is a sin unto death: I do not say that he shall pray for it.
All unrighteousness is TG Sin.sin: and there is a D&C 64:7.sin not unto death.

We know that whosoever is TG Man, New, Spiritually Reborn.born of God JST 1 Jn. 5:18 … continueth not in sin; but he that is begotten of God and keepeth himself, that wicked one overcometh him not.sinneth not; but he that is begotten of God GR guards, shields.keepeth himself, and that James 1:27 (22–27).wicked one toucheth him not.
And we know that we are of TG Called of God.God, and the whole D&C 84:49 (49–53).world lieth in TG Wickedness.wickedness.

And we know that the Son of God is come, and hath given us an understanding, that we may know him that is true, and we are in him that is true, even in his Son Jesus Christ. This is the true God, and 1 Jn. 1:2.eternal life.
Little children, keep yourselves from idols. Amen.

div.p: John rejoices because the children of the elect lady are true and faithful.

chapter.verse: The elder unto the elect lady and her children, whom I love in the truth; and not I only, but also all they that have known the truth;
For the truth’s sake, which dwelleth in us, and shall be with us for ever.
Grace be with you, mercy, and peace, from God the Father, and from the Lord Jesus Christ, the Son of the Father, in truth and love.
I rejoiced greatly that I found of thy children walking in truth, as we have received a commandment from the Father.
And now I beseech thee, lady, not as though I wrote a new commandment unto thee, but that which we had from the beginning, that we love one another.
And this is TG Family, Love within.love, that we TG Walking with God.walk after his commandments. This is the commandment, That, as ye have heard from the 1 Jn. 2:24.beginning, ye should walk in it.
For many TG Deceit.deceivers are entered into the world, who confess not that Jesus Christ is come in the flesh. This is a deceiver and an TG Antichrist.antichrist.
Look to yourselves, that we lose not those things which we have GR performed, acquired.wrought, but that we receive a full reward.
Whosoever transgresseth, and abideth not in the doctrine of Christ, hath not God. He that abideth in the doctrine of Christ, he hath both the Father and the Son.
If there come any unto you, and bring not this doctrine, receive him not into your 1 Cor. 5:11.house, neither bid him God speed:
For he that biddeth him God speed is 1 Tim. 5:22.partaker of his evil deeds.
Having many things to write unto you, I would not TG Scriptures, Writing of. write with paper and ink: but I trust to come unto you, and speak face to face, that our joy may be full.
The children of thy elect sister greet thee. Amen.

div.p: John commends Gaius for his help to those who love the truth.

chapter.verse: The elder unto the wellbeloved Gaius, whom I love in the truth.
Beloved, I wish above all things that thou mayest prosper and be in health, even as thy soul prospereth.
For I rejoiced greatly, when the brethren came and testified of the truth that is in thee, even as thou walkest in the truth.
I have no greater TG Joy.joy than to hear that my 1 Jn. 5:21.children TG Walking with God.walk in truth.
Beloved, thou doest faithfully whatsoever thou doest to the D&C 84:88 (88–92).brethren, and to TG Stranger.strangers;
Which have borne witness of thy charity before the church: whom if thou bring forward on their journey after a godly sort, thou shalt do well:
Because that for his name’s sake they went forth, taking nothing of the Gentiles.
We therefore ought to receive such, that we might be fellowhelpers to the truth.
I wrote unto the church: but Diotrephes, who loveth to have the TG Unrighteous Dominion.preeminence among them, TG Apostasy of the Early Christian Church.receiveth us not.

Wherefore, if I come, I will remember his deeds which he doeth, Num. 16:3.prating against us with malicious words: and not content therewith, neither doth he himself receive the brethren, and forbiddeth them that would, and casteth them out of the church.
Beloved, follow not that which is evil, but that which is good. He that doeth Moro. 7:12.good is of God: but he that doeth evil hath not seen God.
Demetrius hath good report of all men, and of the truth itself: yea, and we also bear record; and ye know that our GR witness, testimony.record is true.
I had many things to write, but I will not with ink and pen TG Scriptures, Writing of.write unto thee:
But I trust I shall shortly see thee, and we shall speak face to face. Peace be to thee. Our friends salute thee. Greet the friends by name.

div.p: Contend for the faith—Some angels kept not their first estate—Michael disputed about the body of Moses—Enoch prophesied of the Second Coming—Mockers will come in the last days.

chapter.verse: JST Jude 1:1 Jude, the servant of God, called of Jesus Christ, and brother of James; to them who are sanctified of the Father; and preserved in Jesus Christ;Jude, the TG Servant.servant of Jesus Christ, and brother of James, to them that are sanctified by God the Father, and preserved in Jesus Christ, and called:
Mercy unto you, and peace, and love, be multiplied.

div.p: Christ chooses some as kings and priests unto God—Christ will come again—John sees the risen Lord.

div.p: He who overcomes will gain eternal life, avoid the second death, inherit the celestial kingdom, and rule many kingdoms.

And I gave her space to repent of her fornication; and she repented not.

div.p: He who overcomes will retain his name in the book of life, reach godhood, and be with Jesus as He is with the Father.
