He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches.

div.p: John sees the celestial earth, the throne of God, and all created things worshipping the Lord.

chapter.verse: After this I looked, and, behold, a door was opened in heaven: and the first voice which I heard was as it were of a trumpet talking with me; which said, Come up hither, and I will TG Revelation.shew thee things which must be hereafter.
And immediately I was in the spirit: and, behold, a throne was set in heaven, and one sat on the throne.
And he that sat was to look upon like a jasper and a sardine stone: and there was a Ezek. 1:28.rainbow round about the throne, in sight like unto an emerald.

JST Rev. 4:4 And in the midst of the throne …And round about the throne were four and twenty GR thrones.seats: and upon the seats I saw four and twenty D&C 77:5.elders sitting, clothed in white raiment; and they had on their heads crowns of gold.

And out of the throne proceeded lightnings and thunderings and voices: and there were seven lamps of fire burning before the throne, which are the JST Rev. 4:5 … seven servants …seven Ezek. 1:13; Rev. 1:4.Spirits of God.

And before the throne there was a Ezek. 1:22; D&C 77:1. TG Earth, Destiny of.sea of glass like unto crystal: JST Rev. 4:6 … and in the midst of the throne were the four and twenty elders; and round about …and in the midst of the throne, and round about the throne, were four D&C 77:2. TG Cherubim; Symbolism.beasts full of eyes before and behind.
And the first beast was like a lion, and the second beast like a calf, and the third beast had a face as a man, and the fourth beast was like a flying eagle.

And the four beasts had each of them six wings about him; and they were full of eyes within: and they rest not day and night, saying, Holy, holy, holy, Isa. 6:3 (2–3); Ezek. 1:28 (9–11, 28).Lord God TG God, Power of.Almighty, which was, and is, and is to come.
And when those beasts give glory and honour and thanks to him that sat on the throne, who liveth for ever and ever,
The four and twenty elders fall down before him that sat on the throne, and worship him that liveth for ever and ever, and cast their crowns before the throne, saying,

Thou art worthy, O Lord, to receive glory and honour and power: for thou hast TG Jesus Christ, Creator.created all things, and GR through, on account of Thy will.for thy pleasure they are and were created.

div.p: John sees the book sealed with seven seals, and he sees those people redeemed out of every nation—He hears every creature praising God and the Lamb.

chapter.verse: And I saw in the right hand of him that sat on the throne a book Ezek. 2:9 (9–10).written within and on the backside, D&C 77:6.sealed with seven TG Seal.seals.
And I saw a strong angel proclaiming with a loud voice, Who is TG Worthiness.worthy to open the book, and to loose the seals thereof?
And no man in heaven, nor in earth, neither under the earth, was able to open the book, neither to look thereon.
And I wept much, because no man was found worthy to open and to read the book, neither to look thereon.

And one of the elders saith unto me, Weep not: behold, the Gen. 49:9.Lion of the tribe of TG Israel, Judah, People of.Juda, the Isa. 11:10; Rev. 22:16 (6–16).Root of David, hath prevailed to open the book, and to loose the seven seals thereof.

And I beheld, and, lo, in the midst of the throne and of the four beasts, and in the midst of the elders, stood a TG Jesus Christ, Types of, in Anticipation.Lamb as it had been slain, JST Rev. 5:6 … having twelve horns and twelve eyes, which are the twelve servants of God, sent forth into all the earth.having seven horns and seven eyes, which are the seven Spirits of God sent forth into all the earth.
And he came and took the book out of the right hand of him that sat upon the throne.

And when he had taken the book, the four beasts and four and twenty elders fell down before the Lamb, having every one of them harps, and golden vials full of GR incense.odours, which are the 1 Chr. 23:13; Ps. 141:2; Rev. 8:4 (3–4).prayers of saints.

And they TG Singing.sung a new song, saying, Thou art worthy to take the book, and to open the seals thereof: for thou wast slain, and hast TG Jesus Christ, Redeemer; Redemption.redeemed us to God by thy blood out of every Rev. 7:9.kindred, and tongue, and people, and nation;
And hast made us unto our God kings and TG Priest, Aaronic Priesthood. BD Priests.priests: and we shall reign on the earth.

And I beheld, and I heard the voice of many angels round about the throne and the beasts and the elders: and the number of them was ten thousand times ten thousand, and Dan. 7:10.thousands of thousands;

Saying with a loud voice, Worthy is the TG Jesus Christ, Lamb of God.Lamb that was slain to receive TG Jesus Christ, Authority of.power, and riches, and TG God, Wisdom of.wisdom, and strength, and honour, and glory, and blessing.

And every D&C 88:104.creature which is in heaven, and on the earth, and under the earth, and such as are in the sea, and all that are in them, heard I saying, Blessing, and honour, and glory, and TG Jesus Christ, Power of.power, be unto him that sitteth upon the throne, and unto the Lamb for ever and ever.
And the four beasts said, Amen. And the four and twenty elders fell down and worshipped him that liveth for ever and ever.

div.p: Christ opens the six seals, and John sees the events therein—In the fifth seal, he sees the Christian martyrs; and in the sixth, he sees the signs of the times.

chapter.verse: JST Rev. 6:1 And I saw when the Lamb opened one of the seals, one of the four beasts, and I heard …And I saw when the Lamb opened one of the TG Seal.seals, and I heard, as it were the noise of thunder, one of the four TG Cherubim.beasts saying, Come and see.
And I saw, and behold a white horse: and he that sat on him had a bow; and a crown was given unto him: and he went forth conquering, and to conquer.
And when he had opened the D&C 77:7; Moses 8:28 (22, 28–29).second seal, I heard the second beast say, Come and see.

And there went out another horse that was red: and power was given to him that sat thereon to take D&C 1:35.peace from the earth, and that they should kill one another: and there was given unto him a great sword.
And when he had opened the third seal, I heard the third beast say, Come and see. And I beheld, and lo a black horse; and he that sat on him had a pair of balances in his hand.
And I heard a voice in the midst of the four beasts say, A measure of wheat for a penny, and three measures of barley for a penny; and see thou hurt not the oil and the wine.
And when he had opened the fourth seal, I heard the voice of the fourth beast say, Come and see.

And I looked, and behold a pale horse: and his name that sat on him was Death, and Hell followed with him. And power was given unto them over the fourth part of the earth, to kill with Ezek. 5:17; 14:21; 33:27.sword, and with hunger, and with death, and with the beasts of the earth.
And when he had opened the fifth seal, I saw under the D&C 135:7.altar the souls of them that were TG Martyrdom; Persecution.slain for the word of God, and for the testimony which they held:
And they cried with a loud voice, saying, How long, O Lord, holy and true, dost thou not judge and Deut. 32:43.avenge our blood on them that dwell on the earth?

And Rev. 3:4.white TG Apparel.robes were given unto every one of them; and it was said unto them, that they should TG Paradise.rest yet for a little season, until their fellowservants also and their brethren, that should be killed as they were, should be fulfilled.

And I beheld when he had opened the D&C 77:10. TG Last Days.sixth seal, and, lo, there was a great Rev. 16:18.earthquake; and the TG World, End of.sun became Matt. 24:29; D&C 45:42.black as sackcloth of hair, and the moon became as Joel 2:31; D&C 88:87.blood;
And the stars of heaven fell unto the earth, even as a fig tree casteth her IE figs that ripen late, hanging on the tree even into the winter.untimely figs, when she is shaken of a mighty wind.

JST Rev. 6:14 And the heavens opened as a scroll is opened when it is rolled together; and every mountain, and island, was moved out of its place.And the heaven departed as a Isa. 34:4; D&C 88:95.scroll when it is rolled together; and every Rev. 16:20 (17–21).mountain and island were moved out of their places.

And the TG Kings, Earthly.kings of the earth, and the great men, and the rich men, and the chief captains, and the mighty men, and every bondman, and every free man, hid themselves in the Isa. 2:19.dens and in the rocks of the mountains;
And said to the Hosea 10:8; Luke 23:30 (27–31).mountains and rocks, Fall on us, and hide us from the face of him that sitteth on the throne, and from the wrath of the Lamb:
For the great TG Day of the Lord; Jesus Christ, Second Coming.day of his wrath is come; and who shall be able to Ps. 76:7.stand?

div.p: John also sees in the sixth seal the Restoration of the gospel, the sealing of the 144,000, and the hosts of the exalted from all nations.

chapter.verse: And after these things I saw four D&C 77:8.angels standing on the four corners of the earth, holding the four Ezek. 37:9; Dan. 11:4.winds of the earth, that the wind should not blow on the earth, nor on the sea, nor on any tree.

And I saw another angel D&C 77:9.ascending from the east, having the TG Seal.seal of the living God: and he cried with a loud voice to the four angels, to whom it was given to hurt the earth and the sea,
Saying, Rev. 9:4.Hurt not the earth, neither the sea, nor the trees, till we have Rev. 22:4 (1–5).sealed the TG High Priest, Melchizedek Priesthood; Servant.servants of our God in their foreheads.

And I heard the number of them which were sealed: and there were sealed an D&C 77:11.hundred and forty and four thousand of all the TG Israel, Twelve Tribes of.tribes of the children of D&C 77:9. TG Israel, Blessings of.Israel.

Of the tribe of TG Israel, Judah, People of.Juda were sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Ezek. 48:31 (6–7, 31).Reuben were sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Gad were sealed twelve thousand.
Of the tribe of Aser were sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Nepthalim were sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Manasses were sealed twelve thousand.
Of the tribe of Simeon were sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Levi were sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Issachar were sealed twelve thousand.
Of the tribe of Zabulon were sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of TG Israel, Joseph, People of.Joseph were sealed twelve thousand. Of the tribe of Benjamin were sealed twelve thousand.

After this I beheld, and, lo, a great multitude, which no man could number, of all nations, and Rev. 5:9.kindreds, and people, and tongues, stood before the throne, and before the Lamb, clothed with white robes, and Ezek. 41:18 (18–19).palms in their hands;
And cried with a loud voice, saying, Salvation to our God which sitteth upon the throne, and unto the Lamb.
And all the angels stood round about the throne, and about the elders and the four TG Cherubim.beasts, and fell before the throne on their faces, and worshipped God,
Saying, Amen: Blessing, and glory, and wisdom, and thanksgiving, and honour, and power, and might, be unto our God for ever and ever. Amen.
And one of the elders answered, saying unto me, What are these which are arrayed in white robes? and whence came they?

And I said unto him, Sir, thou knowest. And he said to me, These are they which came TG Peace of God.out of great TG Tribulation.tribulation, and have 3 Ne. 27:19. TG Purity; Wash.washed their robes, and made them TG Remission of Sins.white in the 1 Jn. 1:7.blood of the TG Jesus Christ, Lamb of God.Lamb.
Therefore are they before the throne of God, and serve him day and night in his TG Temple.temple: and he that Ps. 47:8; D&C 88:13.sitteth on the throne shall TG God, Presence of.dwell among them.
They shall hunger no more, neither Isa. 49:10.thirst any more; neither shall the Ps. 121:6.sun light on them, nor any heat.
For the Lamb which is in the midst of the throne shall feed them, and shall lead them unto living fountains of TG Living Water.waters: and God shall wipe away all Rev. 21:4.tears from their eyes.

div.p: John sees fire and desolation poured out during the seventh seal and preceding the Second Coming.

chapter.verse: And when he had D&C 77:13.opened the TG Jesus Christ, Second Coming; Sabbath.seventh seal, there was TG Silence.silence in heaven about the space of half an hour.
And I saw the seven angels which stood before God; and to them were given seven D&C 77:12.trumpets.

And another angel came and stood at the altar, having a golden censer; and there was given unto him much Lev. 16:13 (12–13); Num. 16:40 (36–40).incense, that he should offer it with the prayers of all saints upon the golden altar which was before the throne.
And the smoke of the incense, which came with the Rev. 5:8.prayers of the saints, ascended up before God out of the angel’s hand.
And the angel took the censer, and filled it with fire of the altar, and Ezek. 10:2.cast it into the earth: and there were D&C 88:90.voices, and thunderings, and lightnings, and an earthquake.
And the seven angels which had the seven D&C 77:12.trumpets prepared themselves to sound.

The first angel sounded, and there followed hail and Ex. 9:24 (22–25).fire mingled with blood, and they were cast upon the earth: and the third part of trees was burnt up, and all green grass was burnt up.
And the second angel sounded, and as it were a great mountain burning with fire was cast into the sea: and the third part of the sea became TG Blood, Symbolism of.blood;
And the third part of the creatures which were in the sea, and had life, died; and the third part of the ships were destroyed.
And the third angel sounded, and there Isa. 14:12.fell a great star from heaven, burning as it were a lamp, and it fell upon the third part of the rivers, and upon the fountains of waters;
And the name of the star is called Wormwood: and the third part of the waters became wormwood; and many men died of the waters, because they were made bitter.

And the fourth angel sounded, and the third part of the sun was smitten, and the third part of the moon, and the third part of the stars; so as the third part of them was darkened, and the day shone not for a third part of it, and the night likewise.

And I beheld, and heard an D&C 88:92.angel flying through the midst of heaven, saying with a loud voice, Hel. 7:22; D&C 5:5.Woe, woe, woe, to the inhabiters of the earth by reason of the other voices of the trumpet of the three angels, which are yet to sound!

div.p: John also sees the wars and plagues poured out during the seventh seal and before the Lord comes.

chapter.verse: And the fifth angel sounded, and I saw a star fall from heaven unto the earth: JST Rev. 9:1 … and to the angel was given the key of the bottomless pit.and to him was given the key of the GR pit of the abyss.bottomless Rev. 20:1.pit.
And he opened the bottomless pit; and there arose a smoke out of the pit, as the smoke of a great furnace; and the sun and the air were darkened by reason of the smoke of the pit.
And there came out of the smoke locusts upon the earth: and unto them was given power, as the scorpions of the earth have power.

And it was commanded them that they should not hurt the grass of the earth, neither any green thing, neither any tree; but only those Rev. 7:3.men which have not the TG Seal.seal of God in their foreheads.
And to them it was given that they should not kill them, but that they should be tormented five months: and their torment was as the torment of a scorpion, when he striketh a man.
And in those days shall men seek Job 3:21; Jer. 8:3.death, and shall not find it; and shall desire to die, and death shall flee from them.
And the shapes of the locusts were like unto horses prepared unto battle; and on their heads were as it were crowns like gold, and their faces were as the faces of men.
And they had hair as the hair of women, and their teeth were as the Joel 1:6. teeth of lions.
And they had breastplates, as it were breastplates of iron; and the sound of their wings was as the Joel 2:5.sound of chariots of many horses running to battle.
And they had tails like unto scorpions, and there were stings in their tails: and their power was to hurt men five months.
And they had a king over them, which is the angel of the bottomless pit, whose name in the Hebrew tongue is Abaddon, but in the Greek tongue hath his name Apollyon.
One woe is past; and, behold, there come two woes more hereafter.
And the sixth angel sounded, and I heard a voice from the four horns of the golden altar which is before God,
Saying to the sixth angel which had the trumpet, Loose the four angels which are bound JST Rev. 9:14 … in the bottomless pit.in the great river Euphrates.
And the four angels were loosed, which were prepared for an hour, and a day, and a month, and a year, for to slay the third part of men.
And the Joel 1:6.number of the army of the horsemen were two hundred thousand thousand: and I heard the number of them.

And thus I saw the horses in the vision, and them that sat on them, having breastplates of fire, and of jacinth, and brimstone: and the heads of the horses were as the heads of lions; and out of their mouths issued fire and smoke and brimstone.
By these three was the third part of men killed, by the fire, and by the smoke, and by the brimstone, which issued out of their mouths.
For their power is in their mouth, and in their tails: for their tails were like unto serpents, and had heads, and with them they do hurt.

And the rest of the men which were not killed by these plagues yet repented not of the works of their hands, that they should not worship devils, and idols of gold, and silver, and brass, and stone, and of wood: which neither can see, nor hear, nor walk:
Neither repented they of their TG Murder.murders, nor of their TG Sorcery.sorceries, nor of their fornication, nor of their thefts.

div.p: John seals up many things relative to the last days—He is commissioned to participate in the restoration of all things.

chapter.verse: And I saw another mighty angel come down from heaven, clothed with a cloud: and a rainbow was upon his head, and his face was as it were the sun, and his feet as pillars of fire:
And he had in his hand a little Ezek. 2:9 (9–10).book open: and he set his right foot upon the sea, and his left foot on the earth,
And cried with a loud voice, as when a lion roareth: and when he had cried, seven thunders uttered their voices.
And when the seven thunders had uttered their voices, I was about to write: and I heard a voice from heaven saying unto me, Seal up those things which the seven thunders uttered, and write them not.
And the angel which I saw D&C 88:110.stand upon the sea and upon the earth lifted up his hand to heaven,

And Dan. 12:7.sware by him that liveth for ever and ever, who created heaven, and the things that therein are, and the earth, and the things that therein are, and the sea, and the things which are therein, that there should be TG Time.time no longer:
But in the days of the voice of the seventh angel, when he shall begin to sound, the TG Mysteries of Godliness.mystery of God should be finished, as he hath declared to his servants the prophets.
And the voice which I heard from heaven spake unto me again, and said, Go and take the little book which is open in the hand of the angel which standeth upon the sea and upon the earth.
And I went unto the angel, and said unto him, Give me the little book. And he said unto me, Take it, and eat it up; and it shall make thy belly bitter, but it shall be in thy mouth sweet as honey.

And I took the little book out of the angel’s hand, and Jer. 15:16; Ezek. 2:8; 3:3 (1–3); D&C 77:14.ate it up; and it was in my mouth sweet as honey: and as soon as I had eaten it, my belly was bitter.
And he said unto me, Thou must prophesy John 21:22 (20–25).again before many peoples, and nations, and tongues, and kings.

div.p: In the last days, two prophets will be slain in Jerusalem—After 3½ days, they will be resurrected—Christ will reign over all the earth.

chapter.verse: And there was given me a Ezek. 45:1.reed like unto a rod: The Greek text omits “and the angel stood.”and the angel stood, saying, Rise, and Ezek. 40:3.measure the temple of God, and the Ex. 30:1; Ezek. 41:22.altar, and them that worship therein.
But the court which is without the temple leave out, and measure it not; for it is given unto the Gentiles: and the Neh. 11:1.holy city shall they tread under foot forty and two months.

And I will give The Greek text omits “power.” power unto my two Isa. 51:19 (19–20); Zech. 4:14 (11–14); 2 Ne. 8:19 (18–20); D&C 77:15. TG Last Days; Witness.witnesses, and they shall prophesy a thousand two hundred and threescore days, clothed in sackcloth.
These are the two olive trees, and the two candlesticks standing before the God of the earth.
And if any man will hurt them, fire proceedeth out of their mouth, and devoureth their enemies: and if any man will hurt them, he must in this manner be killed.

These have power to shut heaven, that it rain not in the days of their prophecy: and have power over waters to Ex. 7:17 (17–21).turn them to blood, and to smite the earth with all TG Plague.plagues, as often as they will.

And when they shall have finished their testimony, the beast that ascendeth out of the bottomless pit shall make war against them, and shall TG Apostasy of the Early Christian Church.overcome them, and TG Martyrdom.kill them.
And their dead bodies shall lie in the street of the great city, which spiritually is called Sodom and Egypt, where also our Lord was TG Jesus Christ, Crucifixion of.crucified.
And they of the people and kindreds and tongues and nations shall see their dead bodies three days and an half, and shall not suffer their dead bodies to be put in graves.
And they that dwell upon the earth shall rejoice over them, and make merry, and shall send gifts one to another; because these two prophets tormented them that dwelt on the earth.
And after three days and an half the Spirit of life from God entered into them, and they stood upon their feet; and great fear fell upon them which saw them.
And they heard a great voice from heaven saying unto them, Come up hither. And they ascended up to heaven in a cloud; and their enemies beheld them.

And the same hour was there a great Rev. 16:18 (18–19); D&C 88:89 (87–90).earthquake, and the tenth part of the city fell, and in the earthquake were slain of men seven thousand: and the remnant were affrighted, and gave glory to the God of heaven.
The second woe is past; and, behold, the third woe cometh quickly.

And the seventh angel sounded; and there were great voices in heaven, saying, The TG Kings, Earthly.kingdoms of this world are become the TG Kingdom of God, on Earth. kingdoms of our Lord, and of his Dan. 7:13 (9–14).Christ; and he shall TG Jesus Christ, Millennial Reign.reign for ever and ever.
And the four and twenty elders, which sat before God on their seats, fell upon their faces, and worshipped God,
Saying, We give thee thanks, O Lord God TG God, Power of.Almighty, which art, and wast, and art to come; because thou hast taken to thee thy great power, and hast reigned.

And the nations were angry, and thy wrath is come, and the time of the dead, that they should be Dan. 7:10; D&C 29:13.judged, and that thou shouldest give reward unto thy servants the prophets, and to the saints, and them that fear thy name, small and great; and shouldest destroy them which GR corrupt, waste, pervert.destroy the earth.

And the temple of God was opened in heaven, and there was seen in his temple the TG Ark of the Covenant.ark of his testament: and there were lightnings, and voices, and thunderings, and an earthquake, and great Ezek. 13:13; Rev. 16:21; D&C 29:16.hail.

div.p: John sees the imminent apostasy of the Church—He also sees the War in Heaven in the beginning when Satan was cast out—He sees the continuation of that war on earth.

chapter.verse: JST Rev. 12:1–17 (Appendix). Note the changed sequence of verses in the JST.And there appeared a great wonder in heaven; a D&C 5:14.woman clothed with the sun, and the moon under her feet, and upon her head a crown of twelve stars:
And she being with Isa. 66:7 (7–9).child cried, travailing in birth, and pained to be delivered.
And there appeared another wonder in heaven; and behold a great red dragon, having seven heads and ten horns, and seven crowns upon his heads.

And his tail drew the D&C 29:36 (36–38). TG Sons of Perdition.third part of the stars of heaven, and did cast them to the earth: and the dragon stood before the woman which was ready to be delivered, for to devour her child as soon as it was born.
And she brought forth a man child, who was to rule all nations with a 1 Ne. 11:25.rod of iron: and her child was caught up unto God, and to his throne.
And the Amos 8:11 (11–12); D&C 33:5; 86:3.woman fled into the wilderness, where she hath a place prepared of God, that they should feed her there a thousand two hundred and threescore days.

And there was TG Council in Heaven; Rebellion; War.war in heaven: TG Adam; Man, Antemortal Existence of.Michael and his TG Angels.angels fought against the dragon; and the TG Devil.dragon fought and his angels,
And prevailed not; neither was their place found any more in TG Death, Spiritual, First.heaven.

And the great dragon was 2 Ne. 9:9 (8–9).cast out, that old serpent, called the TG Devil.Devil, and Satan, which deceiveth the whole world: he was cast out into the earth, and his angels were cast out with him.

And I heard a loud TG God, Manifestations of.voice saying in heaven, Now is come salvation, and TG Strength.strength, and the kingdom of our God, and the TG Jesus Christ, Authority of.power of his Christ: for the Isa. 29:20; D&C 88:124.accuser of our brethren is cast down, which accused them before our God day and night.
And they John 16:33; 1 Jn. 1:7.overcame him by the blood of the Lamb, and by the word of their TG Testimony.testimony; and they loved not their lives unto the TG Martyrdom.death.

Therefore rejoice, ye heavens, and ye that dwell in them. Woe to the inhabiters of the earth and of the sea! for the devil is come down unto you, having great wrath, because he knoweth that he hath but a short time.
And when the dragon saw that he was cast unto the earth, he Dan. 7:25; 12:7; D&C 10:32; 132:57.persecuted the woman which brought forth the man child.

And to the woman were given two wings of a great eagle, that she might fly into the wilderness, into her place, where she is nourished for a time, and times, and half a time, from the face of the serpent.
And the serpent cast out of his mouth water as a flood after the woman, that he might cause her to be carried away of the flood.
And the earth helped the woman, and the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed up the flood which the dragon cast out of his mouth.
And the TG Devil, Church of.dragon was wroth with the woman, and went to make Dan. 7:21.war with the remnant of her seed, which keep the commandments of God, and have the testimony of Jesus Christ.

div.p: John sees fierce-looking beasts that represent degenerate earthly kingdoms controlled by Satan—The devil works miracles and deceives men.

chapter.verse: JST Rev. 13:1 And I saw another sign, in the likeness of the kingdoms of the earth; a beast rise up out of the sea, and he stood upon the sand of the sea, having seven heads …And I stood upon the sand of the sea, and saw a beast rise up out of the Dan. 7:3 (3–7).sea, having seven heads and ten horns, and upon his horns ten crowns, and upon his heads the name of blasphemy.

And the beast which I saw was like unto a leopard, and his feet were as the feet of a bear, and his mouth as the mouth of a lion: and the dragon gave him his Luke 4:6.power, and his seat, and great authority.
And I saw one of his heads as it were wounded to death; and his deadly wound was healed: and all the world wondered after the beast.
And they worshipped the dragon which gave power unto the TG Babylon.beast: and they TG Worship.worshipped the beast, saying, Who is like unto the beast? who is able to make war with him?
And there was given unto him a Dan. 7:8.mouth speaking great things and TG Blaspheme; False Doctrine.blasphemies; and power was given unto him to continue forty and two months.
And he opened his mouth in blasphemy against God, to blaspheme his TG Name.name, and his tabernacle, and them that dwell in heaven.
And it was given unto him to make war with the saints, and to overcome them: and TG False Priesthoods.power was given him over all kindreds, and tongues, and nations.

And all that dwell upon the earth shall worship him, whose names are not written in the TG Book of Life.book of life of the TG Jesus Christ, Lamb of God.Lamb slain from the TG Foreordination.foundation of the world.
If any man have an ear, let him hear.

He that leadeth into captivity shall go into captivity: he that TG Blood, Shedding of; Retribution.killeth with the sword must be killed with the sword. Here is the TG Patience.patience and the faith of the TG Saints.saints.
And I beheld another beast coming up out of the earth; and he had two horns like a lamb, and he spake as a dragon.
And he exerciseth all the power of the first beast before him, and causeth the earth and them which dwell therein to worship the first beast, whose deadly wound was healed.
And he doeth great wonders, so that he maketh fire come down from heaven on the earth in the sight of men,

And Matt. 24:24; Rev. 19:20; 2 Ne. 28:21 (6–21); D&C 52:14.deceiveth them that dwell on the earth by the means of those TG Miracle.miracles which he had power to do in the sight of the beast; saying to them that dwell on the earth, that they should make an image to the beast, which had the wound by a sword, and did live.
And he had power to give life unto the image of the beast, that the image of the beast should both speak, and cause that as many as would not worship the image of the beast should be killed.
And he causeth all, both small and great, rich and poor, free and bond, to receive a mark in their right hand, or in their foreheads:
And that no man might buy or sell, save he that had the mark, or the name of the beast, or the number of his name.
Here is D&C 10:34 (34–35); 57:9.wisdom. Let him that hath understanding count the number of the beast: for it is the number of a man; and his number is Six hundred threescore and six.

div.p: The Lamb will stand upon Mount Zion—The gospel will be restored in the last days by angelic ministry—The Son of Man will harvest the earth.

chapter.verse: And I looked, and, lo, a D&C 133:18.Lamb stood on the mount TG Zion.Sion, and with him an hundred forty and four thousand, having his Father’s Rev. 3:12; 22:4 (1–5). TG Name.name written in their foreheads.
And I heard a voice from heaven, as the voice of many waters, and as the voice of a great thunder: and I heard the voice of harpers harping with their harps:

And they sung as it were a new TG Singing.song before the throne, and before the four beasts, and the elders: and no man could learn that song but the hundred and forty and four thousand, which were redeemed from the earth.

These are they which were not defiled with TG Woman.women; for they are virgins. These are they which follow the Lamb whithersoever he goeth. These were GR purchased, ransomed, redeemed. Jude 1:24; D&C 43:29; 77:5.redeemed from among men, being the firstfruits unto God and to the Lamb.
And in their mouth was found no TG Guile.guile: for they are without fault before the throne of God.

And I saw another D&C 133:36. TG Angels.angel fly in the midst of heaven, having the D&C 79:1.everlasting D&C 27:16. TG Book of Mormon; Gospel; Restoration of the Gospel.gospel to TG Missionary Work.preach unto them that dwell on the earth, and to every TG Nations.nation, and kindred, and tongue, and people,

Saying with a loud voice, D&C 88:104. TG Reverence.Fear God, and give glory to him; for the hour of his TG Judgment, the Last.judgment is come: and TG Worship.worship TG God, Creator.him that made Neh. 9:6.heaven, and earth, and the sea, and the fountains of waters.

And there followed another angel, saying, Isa. 21:9. TG Babylon.Babylon is D&C 88:105.fallen, is fallen, that great Rev. 17:18.city, because she made all nations drink of the wine of the wrath of her D&C 88:94.fornication.
And the third angel followed them, saying with a loud voice, If any man worship the beast and his image, and receive his mark in his forehead, or in his hand,

The same shall drink of the wine of the wrath of God, which is D&C 115:6.poured out without mixture into the cup of his TG God, Indignation of.indignation; and he shall be tormented with fire and brimstone in the presence of the holy angels, and in the presence of the Lamb:
And the smoke of their torment ascendeth up for ever and ever: and they have no rest day nor night, who worship the beast and his image, and whosoever receiveth the mark of his name.
Here is the TG Patience.patience of the saints: here are they that keep the commandments of God, and the faith of Jesus.

And I heard a voice from heaven saying unto me, Write, 1 Ne. 22:22 (22–23); D&C 88:26 (25–29); Moses 7:63 (1–66).Blessed are the TG Death; Spirits, Disembodied.dead which D&C 42:44; 59:2.die in the Lord from henceforth: Yea, saith the Spirit, that they may TG Paradise; Rest.rest from their labours; and their works do follow them.
And I looked, and behold a white cloud, and upon the cloud one sat like unto the TG Jesus Christ, Son of Man.Son of man, having on his head a golden crown, and in his hand a sharp sickle.

And another angel came out of the temple, crying with a loud voice to him that sat on the cloud, D&C 31:5.Thrust in thy sickle, and D&C 12:4.reap: for the time is come for thee to reap; for the TG Harvest.harvest of the earth is D&C 18:6.ripe.
And he that sat on the cloud thrust in his sickle on the earth; and the earth was reaped.
And another angel came out of the temple which is in heaven, he also having a sharp sickle.

And another angel came out from the altar, which had power over fire; and cried with a loud cry to him that had the sharp sickle, saying, Thrust in thy sharp sickle, and gather the clusters of the TG Vineyard of the Lord.vine of the earth; for her grapes are fully ripe.
And the angel thrust in his sickle into the earth, and gathered the vine of the earth, and cast it into the great Isa. 63:3 (3–4); Joel 3:13; Rev. 19:15; D&C 88:106.winepress of the wrath of God.
And the winepress was trodden without the city, and blood came out of the winepress, even unto the horse bridles, by the space of a thousand and six hundred furlongs.

div.p: Exalted Saints praise God in celestial glory forever.

chapter.verse: And I saw another sign in heaven, great and marvellous, seven angels having the seven last TG Plague.plagues; for in them is filled up the wrath of God.

And I saw as it were a D&C 130:7 (1–11).sea of TG Earth, Destiny of.glass mingled with fire: and them that had gotten the victory over the beast, and over his image, and over his mark, and over the number of his name, stand on the sea of glass, having the harps of God.

And they TG Singing.sing the song of Moses the servant of God, and the song of the Lamb, saying, D&C 76:114.Great and marvellous are thy works, Lord God Almighty; TG God, Justice of; Justice.just and true are thy ways, thou King of TG Saints.saints.
Who shall not fear thee, O Lord, and glorify thy Ps. 99:3.name? for thou only art holy: for all nations shall come and worship before thee; for thy judgments are made manifest.
And after that I looked, and, behold, the temple of the tabernacle of the TG Testimony.testimony in heaven was opened:
And the seven angels came out of the temple, having the seven TG Last Days.plagues, clothed in pure and white linen, and having their breasts girded with golden girdles.
And one of the four beasts gave unto the seven angels seven golden vials full of the wrath of God, who liveth for ever and ever.
And the temple was filled with smoke from the glory of God, and from his power; and no man was able to enter into the temple, till the seven plagues of the seven angels were fulfilled.

div.p: God pours out plagues upon the wicked—The nations assemble for Armageddon—Christ comes, islands flee, and mountains cease.

chapter.verse: And I heard a great voice out of the temple saying to the seven angels, Go your ways, and pour out the vials of the wrath of God upon the earth.

And the first went, and poured out his vial upon the earth; and there fell a GR bad, evil.noisome and grievous sore upon the men which had the mark of the beast, and upon them which worshipped his image.
And the second angel poured out his vial upon the sea; and it became as the blood of a dead man: and every living soul died in the sea.
And the third angel poured out his vial upon the rivers and fountains of waters; and they became blood.
And I heard the angel of the waters say, Thou art righteous, O Lord, which art, and wast, and shalt be, because thou hast TG Jesus Christ, Judge.judged thus.
For they have TG Prophets, Rejection of.shed the TG Martyrdom.blood of saints and prophets, and thou hast given them blood to drink; for they are GR deserving.worthy.
And I heard another out of the altar say, Even so, Lord God Almighty, true and righteous are thy judgments.
And the fourth angel poured out his vial upon the sun; and power was given unto him to scorch men with fire.
And men were scorched with great heat, and TG Blaspheme.blasphemed the name of God, which hath power over these plagues: and they repented not to give him glory.
And the fifth angel poured out his vial upon the seat of the beast; and his kingdom was full of TG Darkness, Spiritual.darkness; and they gnawed their tongues for pain,
And blasphemed the God of heaven because of their TG Pain.pains and their sores, and repented not of their deeds.
And the sixth angel poured out his vial upon the great river Euphrates; and the water thereof was dried up, that the way of the kings of the east might be prepared.
And I saw three unclean spirits like frogs come out of the mouth of the dragon, and out of the mouth of the beast, and out of the mouth of the TG Antichrist; False Prophets.false prophet.

For they are the D&C 50:1.spirits of Matt. 24:24; 2 Ne. 9:9 (8–12).devils, working TG Miracle.miracles, which go forth unto the kings of the earth and of the whole world, to gather them to the Rev. 17:14.battle of that great day of God Almighty.
Behold, I come as a Luke 21:35; Rev. 3:3.thief. Blessed is he that D&C 49:7 (5–9); 106:5 (4–5). TG Watch.watcheth, and keepeth his garments, lest he walk naked, and they see his shame.
And he gathered them together into a place called in the Hebrew tongue Ezek. 38:16 (15–16); Joel 3:14 (9–14); Zech. 14:2 (2–5); Luke 21:20 (20–24).Armageddon.
And the seventh angel poured out his vial into the air; and there came a great voice out of the temple of heaven, from the throne, saying, It is done.

And there were voices, and thunders, and lightnings; and there was a great Dan. 12:1; Rev. 6:12; 11:13 (13–14).earthquake, such as was not since men were upon the earth, so mighty an earthquake, and so great.

And the great city was divided into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell: and great TG Babylon.Babylon came in remembrance before God, to give unto her the cup of the wine of the fierceness of his TG God, Indignation of.wrath.
And every island fled away, and the Isa. 64:1; Rev. 6:14 (12–17); D&C 133:22 (1–42).mountains were not found.

And there fell upon men a great Ex. 9:18 (13–35); Josh. 10:11; Ezek. 13:13; 38:22; Rev. 11:19; Mosiah 12:6; D&C 29:16.hail out of heaven, every stone about the weight of a talent: and men blasphemed God because of the plague of the hail; for the plague thereof was exceeding great.

div.p: John is shown that Babylon the great, the mother of harlots and abominations, has become established throughout the earth.

chapter.verse: And there came one of the seven angels which had the seven vials, and talked with me, saying unto me, Come hither; I will shew unto thee the Rev. 18:3 (3–9); 19:2.judgment of the great TG Devil, Church of.whore that sitteth upon many Jer. 51:13.waters:
With whom the kings of the earth have committed fornication, and the Isa. 24:6.inhabitants of the earth have been made drunk with the wine of her 1 Ne. 14:13 (9–13).fornication.
So he carried me away in the spirit into the wilderness: and I saw a woman sit upon a scarlet coloured beast, full of TG Name.names of blasphemy, having seven heads and ten horns.

And the woman was arrayed in purple and scarlet colour, and decked with gold and precious stones and pearls, having a golden cup in her hand D&C 10:21.full of abominations and TG Filthiness.filthiness of her fornication:
And upon her forehead was a name written, TG Secret Combinations. Mystery , TG Babylon. Babylon the Great, the D&C 88:94. Mother of Harlots and Abominations of the Earth.

And I saw the woman drunken with the Rev. 18:24 (22–24).blood of the saints, and with the blood of the TG Martyrdom.martyrs of Jesus: and when I saw her, I wondered with great GR astonishment, wonder.admiration.
And the angel said unto me, Wherefore didst thou marvel? I will tell thee the mystery of the woman, and of the beast that carrieth her, which hath the seven heads and ten horns.

The beast that thou sawest was, and is not; and shall ascend out of the bottomless pit, and go into TG Death, Spiritual, Second; Hell.perdition: and they that dwell on the earth shall wonder, whose names were not written in the Ps. 139:16.book of life from the foundation of the world, when they behold the beast that was, and is not, and yet is.
And here is the TG Mind.mind which hath wisdom. The seven heads are seven mountains, on which the woman sitteth.
And there are seven TG Kings, Earthly.kings: five are fallen, and one is, and the other is not yet come; and when he cometh, he must continue a short space.
And the beast that was, and is not, even he is the eighth, and is of the seven, and goeth into perdition.
And the ten Dan. 7:24.horns which thou sawest are ten kings, which have received no kingdom as yet; but receive power as kings one hour with the beast.
These have one mind, and shall give their power and strength unto the beast.

These shall make Rev. 16:14.war with the Lamb, and the Lamb shall overcome them: for he is Deut. 10:17; Rev. 19:16 (11–16). TG Jesus Christ, Lord; Jesus Christ, Power of.Lord of lords, and Dan. 2:47; 1 Tim. 6:15.King of kings: and they that are with him are called, and chosen, and faithful.
And he saith unto me, The waters which thou sawest, where the whore sitteth, are peoples, and multitudes, and nations, and tongues.

And the ten horns which thou sawest upon the beast, these shall hate the 1 Ne. 22:13 (13–14).whore, and shall make her desolate and naked, and shall eat her flesh, and Rev. 18:8 (6–18).burn her with fire.
For God hath put in their hearts to fulfil his will, and to agree, and Dan. 8:24.give their kingdom unto the beast, until the D&C 1:37.words of God shall be fulfilled.
And the woman which thou sawest is that great Rev. 14:8.city, which reigneth over the kings of the earth.

div.p: The Saints are called out of Babylon lest they partake of her sins—She falls and is lamented by her supporters.

chapter.verse: And after these things I saw another angel come down from heaven, having great power; and the earth was Ezek. 43:2.lightened with his glory.

And he cried mightily with a strong voice, saying, TG Babylon.Babylon the great is fallen, is fallen, and is become the habitation of devils, and the GR ward, prison.hold of every foul spirit, and a GR ward, prison.cage of every unclean and hateful bird.

For all nations have drunk of the wine of the wrath of her Rev. 17:1 (1–2); D&C 35:11.fornication, and the kings of the earth have committed Isa. 23:17.fornication with her, and the merchants of the earth are waxed rich through the GR power of her wantonness.abundance of her delicacies.
And I heard another voice from heaven, saying, Zech. 2:7.Come Gen. 19:14.out of her, my people, that ye be not partakers of her Isa. 52:11.sins, and that ye receive not of her plagues.
For her Jer. 51:9 (8–9).sins have reached unto heaven, and God hath remembered her iniquities.
D&C 1:9. TG Retribution.Reward her even as she rewarded you, and double unto her double according to her works: in the cup which she hath filled fill to her double.

How much she hath glorified herself, and lived GR wantonly, riotously.deliciously, so much torment and sorrow give her: for she saith in her heart, I sit a queen, and am no widow, and shall see no sorrow.

Therefore shall her TG Plague.plagues come in one day, death, and mourning, and famine; and she shall be utterly Rev. 17:16; D&C 64:24; 86:7.burned with fire: for strong is the Lord God who TG Jesus Christ, Judge.judgeth her.
And the kings of the earth, who have committed fornication and lived deliciously with her, shall Jer. 51:8.bewail her, and lament for her, when they shall see the Gen. 19:28.smoke of her burning,
Standing afar off for the fear of her torment, saying, Alas, alas, that great city Babylon, that mighty city! for in one hour is thy judgment come.
And the merchants of the earth shall weep and mourn over her; for no man buyeth their merchandise any more:

The merchandise of gold, and silver, and precious stones, and of pearls, and fine linen, and purple, and silk, and scarlet, and all thyine wood, and all manner vessels of ivory, and all manner vessels of most precious wood, and of brass, and iron, and marble,
And cinnamon, and odours, and ointments, and frankincense, and wine, and oil, and fine flour, and wheat, and beasts, and sheep, and horses, and chariots, and TG Slavery.slaves, and souls of men.
And the fruits that thy soul TG Lust.lusted after are departed from thee, and all things which were dainty and goodly are departed from thee, and thou shalt find them no more at all.
The merchants of these things, which were made rich by her, shall stand afar off for the fear of her torment, weeping and wailing,
And saying, Alas, alas, that great city, that was clothed in fine linen, and purple, and scarlet, and decked with gold, and precious stones, and pearls!
For in one hour so great riches is come to nought. And every shipmaster, and all the company in ships, and sailors, and as many as trade by sea, stood afar off,
And cried when they saw the smoke of her burning, saying, What city is like unto this great city!

And they cast Ezek. 27:30.dust on their heads, and cried, weeping and wailing, saying, Alas, alas, that great city, wherein were made rich all that had ships in the sea by reason of her costliness! for in one hour is she made desolate.
Rejoice over her, thou heaven, and ye holy apostles and prophets; for God hath avenged you on her.

And a mighty angel took up a stone like a great millstone, and cast it into the sea, saying, Thus with violence shall that great city TG Babylon; Devil, Church of.Babylon be thrown down, and shall be found no more at all.

And the voice of harpers, and musicians, and of pipers, and trumpeters, shall be heard no more at all in thee; and no craftsman, of whatsoever craft he be, shall be found any more in thee; and the sound of a millstone shall be heard no more at all in thee;

And the light of a candle shall shine no more at all in thee; and the Jer. 7:34.voice of the bridegroom and of the bride shall be heard no more at all in thee: for thy merchants were the great men of the earth; for by thy TG Sorcery.sorceries were all nations deceived.
And in her was found the Rev. 17:6 (1–18); 2 Ne. 27:4 (3–4); 28:10; Morm. 8:27 (27, 40–41).blood of prophets, and of saints, and of all that were slain upon the earth.

div.p: The marriage supper of the Lamb is made ready—The testimony of Jesus is the spirit of prophecy—Christ is King of Kings and Lord of Lords.

chapter.verse: And after these things I heard a great voice of much people in heaven, saying, Alleluia; Salvation, and glory, and honour, and power, unto the Lord our God:

For true and righteous are his TG Jesus Christ, Judge.judgments: for he hath Rev. 17:1 (1–2).judged the great D&C 29:21.whore, which did corrupt the earth with her fornication, and hath avenged the blood of his servants at her hand.
And again they said, Alleluia. And her Gen. 19:28.smoke rose up for ever and ever.
And the four and twenty elders and the four TG Cherubim.beasts fell down and worshipped God that sat on the throne, saying, Amen; Alleluia.
And a voice came out of the throne, saying, Praise our God, all ye his servants, and ye that fear him, both small and great.

And I heard as it were the voice of a great multitude, and as the voice of many waters, and as the voice of mighty thunderings, saying, Alleluia: for the Lord Dan. 2:47.God TG Jesus Christ, Power of.omnipotent reigneth.

Let us be glad and rejoice, and give honour to him: for the Isa. 54:5; Matt. 22:2 (2–14); Luke 5:34; Rev. 21:2.marriage of the TG Jesus Christ, Lamb of God.Lamb is come, and his wife hath made herself ready.
And to her was granted that she should be arrayed in fine linen, clean and white: for the fine Matt. 22:11 (11–14); 1 Ne. 12:10 (10–11).linen is the Alma 5:27.righteousness of saints.

And he saith unto me, Write, Blessed are they which are called unto the D&C 58:11.marriage Luke 14:15; 22:30.supper of the TG Jesus Christ, Lamb of God.Lamb. And he saith unto me, These are the true sayings of God.

And I Rev. 22:8.fell at his feet to TG Worship.worship him. And he said unto me, See thou do it not: I am thy Acts 10:26; Rev. 1:1 (1–6).fellowservant, and of thy brethren that have the testimony of Jesus: worship God: for the TG Testimony.testimony of Jesus is the spirit of TG Prophecy.prophecy.
And I saw heaven opened, and behold a white horse; and he that sat upon him was called Faithful and True, and in righteousness he doth TG Jesus Christ, Judge.judge and make TG War.war.
His TG God, Manifestations of.eyes were as a flame of fire, and on his head were many crowns; and he had a Rev. 2:17 (12–17).name written, that no man knew, but he himself.
And he was Isa. 63:2 (2–3); D&C 133:48 (48–51).clothed with a vesture dipped in blood: and his TG Name.name is called The Moses 1:32 (32–33). TG Jesus Christ, Messenger of the Covenant.Word of God.
And the armies which were in heaven followed him upon white horses, TG Clothing.clothed in fine linen, white and clean.

JST Rev. 19:15 And out of his mouth proceedeth the word of God, and with it he will smite the nations; and he will rule them with the word of his mouth; and he treadeth the winepress in the fierceness and wrath of Almighty God. Isa. 11:4.And out of his mouth goeth a sharp sword, that with it he should smite the nations: and he shall TG Jesus Christ, Authority of.rule them with a rod of iron: and he treadeth the Isa. 63:3 (3–4); Rev. 14:19 (17–20); D&C 88:106.winepress of the fierceness and wrath of Almighty God.

And he hath on his vesture and on his thigh a name written, TG Jesus Christ, Second Coming.
King of Kings
, and
Deut. 10:17; Rev. 17:14.
Lord
of Lords .
And I saw an angel standing in the sun; and he cried with a loud voice, saying to all the fowls that fly in the midst of heaven, Come and gather yourselves together unto the supper of the great God;

That ye may eat the flesh of kings, and the flesh of captains, and the flesh of mighty men, and the flesh of horses, and of them that sit on them, and the flesh of all JST Rev. 19:18 … who fight against the Lamb, both bond and free, both small and great. men , both free and bond, both small and great.
And I saw the beast, and the kings of the earth, and their armies, gathered together to make war against him that sat on the horse, and against his army.

And the beast was taken, and with him the TG Antichrist; False Prophets.false prophet that wrought TG Miracle.miracles before him, with which he Rev. 13:14 (11–18).deceived them that had received the mark of the beast, and them that worshipped his image. These both were cast alive into a Matt. 8:12; 13:42; D&C 112:24. TG Hell.lake of Dan. 7:11.fire burning with brimstone.

And the remnant were slain JST Rev. 19:21 … with the word of him that sat upon the horse, which word proceeded out of his mouth …with the sword of him that sat upon the horse, which sword proceeded out of his mouth: and all the fowls were filled with their flesh.

div.p: Satan is bound during the Millennium—The Saints will then live and reign with Christ—The dead stand before God and are judged out of the books according to their works.

chapter.verse: And I saw an TG Angels.angel come down from heaven, having the key of the bottomless Rev. 9:1; D&C 76:48.pit and a great chain in his hand.
And he laid hold on the dragon, that old Isa. 27:1.serpent, which is the TG Devil.Devil, and Satan, and D&C 84:100.bound him a thousand years,

And cast him into the bottomless pit, and shut him up, and set a seal upon him, that he should deceive the TG Nations.nations no more, till the thousand years should be fulfilled: and after that he must be D&C 43:31.loosed a little season.

And I saw thrones, and they sat upon them, and Dan. 7:22; 1 Cor. 6:2; 3 Ne. 27:27; D&C 20:13 (5–15); 75:21 (21–22).judgment was given unto them: and I saw the souls of them that were beheaded for the witness of Jesus, and for the word of God, and which had not worshipped the beast, neither his image, neither had received his mark upon their foreheads, or in their hands; and they lived and TG Jesus Christ, Millennial Reign.reigned with Christ a TG Millennium.thousand years.
But the rest of the D&C 43:18; 88:101. TG Spirits, Disembodied.dead lived not again until the thousand years were finished. This is the first resurrection.

JST Rev. 20:6 Blessed and holy are they who have part in the first resurrection …Blessed and holy is he that hath part in the D&C 63:18.first TG Resurrection.resurrection: on such the TG Death, Spiritual, Second.second death hath no power, but they shall be TG Priest, Aaronic Priesthood; Priest, Melchizedek Priesthood. BD Priests.priests of God and of Christ, and shall reign with him a thousand years.
And when the TG Jesus Christ, Millennial Reign.thousand years are expired, TG Devil.Satan shall be loosed out of his prison,

And shall go out to deceive the nations which are in the four quarters of the earth, Gen. 10:2 (2–3); Ezek. 38:2.Gog and Magog, to gather them together to battle: the number of whom is as the sand of the sea.
And they went up on the breadth of the earth, and compassed the camp of the saints about, and the beloved city: and fire came down from God out of heaven, and devoured them.

And the D&C 28:11.devil that deceived them was D&C 19:3.cast into the lake of Dan. 7:11; D&C 76:36.fire and brimstone, where the beast and the false prophet are, and shall be tormented day and night for ever and ever.
And I saw a great white throne, and him that sat on it, from whose face the D&C 29:24 (24–25).earth and the heaven fled away; and there was found no Dan. 2:35 (31–36).place for them.

And I saw the Alma 11:44 (43–44). TG Death.dead, small and great, TG Resurrection.stand before God; and the Dan. 7:10.books were opened: and another book was opened, which is the TG Book of Life. book of life: and the dead were D&C 137:9. TG Accountability; Judgment, the Last.judged out of those things which were written in the books, according to their TG Good Works.works.

And the sea gave up the dead which were in it; and 2 Tim. 1:10.death and TG Hell; Spirits in Prison.hell delivered up the dead which were in them: and they were judged every man according to their works.
And 1 Cor. 15:26 (26, 54).death and TG Damnation.hell were cast into the lake of fire. This is the TG Death, Spiritual, Second.second death.
And whosoever was not found written in the book of life was cast into the lake of fire.

div.p: Those who overcome will be sons of God—The earth attains its celestial glory.

chapter.verse: And I saw a TG Celestial Glory.new TG Heaven.heaven and a new TG Earth, Destiny of; Earth, Renewal of.earth: for the first heaven and the first TG World, End of.earth were passed away; and there was no more sea.
And I John saw the holy city, TG Zion.new TG Jerusalem, New.Jerusalem, coming down from God out of heaven, prepared as a Matt. 22:2 (2–14); Luke 5:34; Rev. 19:7 (7–9).bride adorned for her husband.

And I heard a great voice out of heaven saying, Behold, the tabernacle of God is with men, and he will TG God, Presence of.dwell with them, and they shall be his people, and Ezek. 48:35.God himself shall be with them, and be their God.

And God shall wipe away all tears from their eyes; and there shall be no more Rev. 7:17.death, neither TG Mourning; Sorrow.sorrow, nor crying, neither shall there be any more TG Pain.pain: for the former things are passed away.
And he that sat upon the throne said, Behold, I make all things 2 Cor. 5:17; D&C 130:5–9.new. And he said unto me, TG Scriptures, Writing of.Write: for these D&C 1:37.words are true and faithful.

And he said unto me, It is done. TG Jesus Christ, Jehovah.I am D&C 45:7.Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end. I will give unto him that is athirst of the fountain of the TG Living Water.water of life freely.
He that Rev. 2:7; D&C 76:60 (58–60).overcometh shall TG Exaltation.inherit Ps. 84:11. TG Eternal Life.all things; and I will be his God, and he shall be my TG Sons and Daughters of God.son.

But the fearful, and TG Stiffnecked.unbelieving, and the abominable, and TG Murder.murderers, and TG Adulterer; Chastity.whoremongers, and TG Sorcery.sorcerers, and idolaters, and all TG Lying.liars, shall have their part in the lake which burneth with fire and brimstone: which is the TG Hell.second TG Death, Spiritual, Second.death.

And there came unto me one of the seven angels which had the seven vials full of the seven last TG Plague.plagues, and talked with me, saying, Come hither, I will shew thee the bride, the Lamb’s wife.
And he carried me away in the spirit to a great and high Ezek. 40:2; Moses 1:1.mountain, and shewed me that great city, the holy Moses 7:63 (21, 62–64).Jerusalem, descending out of heaven from God,
Having the Ezek. 43:2 (1–6).glory of God: and her light was like unto a stone most precious, even like a jasper stone, clear as crystal;
And had a wall great and high, and had twelve Ezek. 48:31.gates, and at the gates twelve angels, and names written thereon, which are the names of the twelve tribes of the children of Israel:
On the east three gates; on the north three gates; on the south three gates; and on the west three gates.
And the wall of the city had twelve foundations, and in them the names of the twelve apostles of the Lamb.
And he that talked with me had a golden reed to measure the city, and the gates thereof, and the wall thereof.

And the city lieth foursquare, and the Ezek. 40:5.length is as large as the breadth: and he measured the city with the reed, twelve thousand GR stadia. A stadium was about 607 English feet, or 185.2 meters.furlongs. The length and the breadth and the height of it are equal.
And he measured the wall thereof, an hundred and forty and four cubits, according to the measure of a man, that is, of the angel.
And the building of the wall of it was of jasper: and the city was pure gold, like unto clear glass.
And the foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with all manner of precious stones. The first foundation was jasper; the second, sapphire; the third, a chalcedony; the fourth, an emerald;
The fifth, sardonyx; the sixth, sardius; the seventh, chrysolite; the eighth, beryl; the ninth, a topaz; the tenth, a chrysoprasus; the eleventh, a jacinth; the twelfth, an amethyst.
And the twelve gates were twelve pearls; every several gate was of one pearl: and the street of the city was pure D&C 137:4 (2–4).gold, as it were transparent TG Earth, Destiny of.glass.
And I saw no temple therein: for the Lord God TG God, Power of.Almighty and the Lamb are the TG Temple.temple of it.

And the city had no need of the Isa. 60:19; Rev. 22:5.sun, neither of the moon, to shine in it: for the glory of God did lighten it, and the TG Jesus Christ, Lamb of God.Lamb is the TG Jesus Christ, Light of the World.light thereof.
And the nations of them which are saved shall TG Walking with God.walk in the light of it: and the TG Kings, Earthly.kings of the Isa. 49:22; 60:5.earth do bring their glory and honour into it.
And the Isa. 60:11.gates of it shall not be shut at all by day: for there shall be no night there.
And they shall bring the glory and honour of the nations into it.

And there shall in no wise enter into it any thing that D&C 76:112 (81–112).defileth, neither whatsoever worketh abomination, or maketh a lie: but they which are written in the Lamb’s TG Book of Life.book of life.

div.p: The Saints will reign in celestial splendor—Christ will come, and men will be judged—Blessed are they who keep His commandments.

chapter.verse: And he shewed me a pure river of Ezek. 47:1; Joel 3:18; Zech. 14:8.water of life, clear as crystal, proceeding out of the throne of God and of the Lamb.

In the midst of the street of it, and on either side of the river, was there the Gen. 2:9; Rev. 2:7 (1–7); 1 Ne. 8:10 (1–11).tree of TG Immortality.life, which bare twelve manner of fruits, and yielded her fruit every month: and the Ezek. 47:12.leaves of the tree were for the healing of the nations.

And there shall be no more TG Curse; Earth, Curse of.curse: but the Jer. 3:17; Joel 3:21 (18–21); Zech. 2:10 (10–12).throne of God and of the TG Jesus Christ, Lamb of God.Lamb shall be in it; and his servants shall serve him:

And they shall TG God, Privilege of Seeing.see his John 14:3; 1 Thes. 4:17; D&C 38:8 (7–8). TG God, Body of, Corporeal Nature.face; and his Rev. 3:12 (7–13); 7:3 (2–8); 14:1 (1–5).name shall be in their foreheads.

And there shall be no night there; and they need no candle, neither light of the Isa. 60:19; Rev. 21:23.sun; for the Lord God giveth them TG Earth, Destiny of.light: and they shall Matt. 25:34. TG Eternal Life; Kingdom of God, on Earth.reign D&C 132:20.for ever and ever.

And he said unto me, These sayings are faithful and D&C 68:34.true: and the Lord God of the holy prophets sent his angel to shew unto his servants the things which must Rev. 1:1 (1–6); D&C 88:79.shortly be done.
Behold, I D&C 51:20.come quickly: Rev. 1:3 (1–6).blessed is he that keepeth the D&C 58:2.sayings of the prophecy of this book.
And I John saw these things, and heard them. And when I had heard and seen, I Rev. 19:10.fell down to worship before the feet of the angel which shewed me these things.
Then saith he unto me, See thou do it not: for I am thy fellowservant, and of thy brethren the prophets, and of them which keep the sayings of this book: worship God.
And he saith unto me, Seal not the sayings of the prophecy of this book: for the time is at hand.

He that is Alma 41:13 (10–15).unjust, let him be Dan. 12:10.unjust still: and he which is TG Filthiness.filthy, let him be filthy still: and he that is righteous, let him be righteous still: and he that is holy, let him be holy still.
And, behold, I 1 Thes. 2:19; 3:13; Rev. 1:7.come quickly; and my TG Reward.reward is with me, to give every man according as his Alma 41:13.work shall be.
I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end, the TG God, Eternal Nature of.first and the last.
Blessed are they that TG Obedience.do his TG Good Works.commandments, that they may have right to the tree of life, and may enter in through the gates into the city.
For without are dogs, and TG Sorcery; Telestial Glory.sorcerers, and TG Adulterer; Whore.whoremongers, and TG Murder.murderers, and idolaters, and whosoever loveth and maketh a TG Lying.lie.

I Jesus have sent mine TG Angels.angel to testify unto you these things in the churches. I am the Isa. 53:2; Rev. 5:5 (1–14).root and the offspring of David, and the bright and morning 2 Pet. 1:19; Rev. 2:28.star.

And the Spirit and the bride say, Moro. 10:32 (30–33).Come. And let him that heareth say, Come. And let him that is athirst come. And whosoever will, let him take the TG Living Water.water of life freely.

For I testify unto every man that heareth the words of the prophecy of this book, If any man shall Deut. 4:2 (2–3); 3 Ne. 11:40 (39–40); D&C 20:35 (35–36). TG Scriptures, Preservation of.add unto these things, God shall add unto him the TG Plague.plagues that are written in this book:

And if any man shall take away from the words of the book of this prophecy, God shall take away his part out of the TG Book of Life.book of life, and out of the holy city, and from the things which are written in this book.
He which testifieth these things saith, Surely I D&C 33:18; 35:27.come quickly. Amen. Even so, come, Lord Jesus.
The Rom. 16:24 (20–24).grace of our TG Jesus Christ, Lord.Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
